title: SAP Data Specialist (m/w/d)
description: Über Mettler Toledo METTLER TOLEDO ist ein weltweit führender Anbieter von Präzisionsinstrumenten und Dienstleistungen. In Labor-, Prozessanalytik-, Industrie-, Produktinspektions- und Einzelhandelsanwendungen sind wir bekannt für Innovation und Qualität. Unser Vertriebs-und Servicenetzwerk zählt zu den umfangreichsten der Branche. Unsere Produkte werden in mehr als 140 Ländern verkauft, und wir sind unmittelbar in ca. 40 Ländern präsent. Weitere Informationen finden Sie unter www.mt.com. Ihre Aufgaben An unserem Standort in Albstadt suchen wir einen SAP Specialist (m/w/d), der sich unter anderem auf die SAP Bausteine Variant Configurator und das Material Management fokussiert. Sie entwickeln und betreuen unsere Produktmodelle im SAP-Variantenkonfigurator Die Pflege, Verwaltung und Bereitstellung von Stammdaten zur Preisgestaltung für unsere Produktmanager, die Support-Teams und Logistik-Hub gehören ebenfalls zu Ihren Aufgaben Sie fungieren als Ansprechpartner*in in allen Belangen des SAP-Konfigurators und agieren hierbei als SAP-Key-User*in Dabei erstellen Sie Beziehungswissen zur automatischen Auflösung von Stücklisten und Arbeitsplänen Ebenso unterstützen Sie bei Produkteinführungen, Produktabkündigungen und der Durchführung von Materialplanungen Ihr Profil Sie verfügen über ein erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Studium der Wirtschaftsinformatik, Informatik, Technischen Informatik, Maschinenbau oder eine abgeschlossene Berufsausbildung mit Weiterbildung zum Techniker (m/w/d) Sie besitzen Know-how im Data Management, und in administrativen Marketing- bzw. Vertriebsthemen Auch Kenntnisse und mehrjährige Praxiserfahrung im Bereich SAP Stammdatenmanagement, insbesondere SAP LO-VC, Stücklisten Dabei sprechen Sie Deutsch und Englisch auf einem sehr guten bis verhandlungssicheren Level Unser Angebot Attraktives Vergütungspaket: eine unbefristete Festanstellung in einem innovativen und internationalen Unternehmen, flexible Arbeitszeiten in einer 35h-Woche im Rahmen des Tarifvertrags der Metall- und Elektroindustrie (zzgl. Urlaubs- und Weihnachtsgeld), 30 Tage Jahresurlaub, Fahrrad-Leasing, kostenlose Lademöglichkeiten für Ihr privates Elektro- oder Hybrid-Fahrzeug und verschiedene Angebote zur Gesundheitsvorsorge, nach erfolgter Einarbeitung ein Tag mobiles Arbeiten pro Woche möglich. Eigenverantwortung & WIR-Gefühl: Kurze Entscheidungswege, angenehmes Arbeitsklima, regelmäßige Teamevents. Fachliche und persönliche Weiterentwicklung: Wir investieren in Ihre kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung durch eine moderne Learning Plattform sowie kontinuierliche Classroom Trainings in den verschiedensten Bereichen. Sicherheit & Karrierechancen: Wir sind Marktführer in einer krisensicheren Wachstumsbranche und legen großen Wert auf eine umfassende Einarbeitung: E-Learnings, Präsenzschulungen, Kennenlernen von funktionsübergreifenden Abteilungen, etc. BEWERBEN SIE SICH JETZT - Wir freuen uns auf Sie Als zukunftsorientiertes Unternehmen stellt sich METTLER TOLEDO seiner sozialen und ökologischen Verantwortung. Unseren aktuellen CSR Report 2026 finden Sie hier: https://digital.mt.com/gc/crr2024/index.html Seit 2020 ist METTLER TOLEDO ein CO₂ neutrales Unternehmen. Weitere Informationen zu unseren umfassenden Umweltprogrammen finden Sie hier: https://www.mt.com/de/de/home/microsites/sustainability.html Das klingt spannend? Starten Sie jetzt ganz einfach den Bewerbungsprozess direkt über unser Online-Portal. Sollten Sie Fragen vorab haben, melden Sie sich gerne bei Katharina Weber unter katharina.weber@mt.com. Wir freuen uns darauf, Sie kennenzulernen! Die Stelle reizt Sie, aber Sie erfüllen nicht alle Kriterien zu 100%? Lassen Sie uns trotzdem miteinander reden, oft ergeben sich Möglichkeiten im gemeinsamen Gespräch. Chancengleichheit Wir setzen uns für Chancengleichheit ein und legen Wert auf Vielfalt in unserem Unternehmen. Wir ermöglichen die Beschäftigung unabhängig von Rasse, Hautfarbe, Religion, Geschlecht, Alter, nationaler Herkunft, Behinderung, sexueller Orientierung, Geschlechtsidentität, genetischen Informationen oder einer anderen geschützten Klassifizierung. title: SAP Transformation Lead
description: Job Description Salary Range £62,000 - £90,000 Leonardo UK operates a grade-based salary framework with broad bands. The salary range shown reflects the approved grade band for this role, or a narrower hiring range published within that band, and is benchmarked against the external market. Exceptions above the standard range are managed through governance controls to protect internal equity. Your Impact Join Leonardo UK as an SAP Transformation Lead and play a pivotal role in reshaping the digital backbone of a leading defence organisation. This is a rare opportunity to lead a complex, enterprise-wide SAP transformation—driving innovation across engineering, manufacturing, and operations while ensuring the highest standards of security, performance, and compliance in a mission-critical environment. You will take ownership of a major SAP upgrade programme, guiding the organisation from a legacy landscape to a future-ready platform aligned with long-term strategic goals. Working at the intersection of technology and business, you will define the transformation roadmap, lead solution design and integration across SAP, PLM, and MES systems, and enable a seamless digital thread that enhances visibility, efficiency, and decision-making across the enterprise. In this role you will Own and drive the end-to-end upgrade of the legacy SAP system (including all functions). Ownership of end-end business processes which impact on SAP (BD –Planning - Engineering- Manufacturing – Customer Support – Finance). Define and manage the upgrade strategy, including scope, deployment approach, risk mitigation, and resource planning. Lead technical assessment, solution design, data migration strategy, and cutover planning. Ensure all processes, custom code, and integrations are mapped, rationalised, or redesigned to meet future business needs. Develop and maintain a multi-year SAP technology roadmap aligned with business objectives and defence-industry compliance requirements, which is to include the system management of secret (or higher) parts or products in an operational environment. Identify opportunities for standardisation, process harmonisation, automation, and adoption of new SAP capabilities. Define governance frameworks for enhancement requests, prioritisation, and change control. Serve as the primary SAP interface with PLM and MES programme teams. Design and own the integration strategy between SAP, PLM, and MES to ensure seamless engineering, manufacturing, and supply-chain workflows. Ensure data alignment, Bill of Materials (BOM) synchronisation, configuration management, and traceability across systems (including secret parts or products). Champion end-to-end digital thread capability. Collaborate with Future Factory, Engineering, Supply Chain, Operations, IT Security, and Programme Leadership to define requirements and ensure solution alignment. Manage external partners and system integrators, ensuring delivery quality and adherence to standards. Communicate progress, relevant KPI’s, risks, and decisions to senior leader. Ensure all SAP solutions comply with defence-sector regulations, cybersecurity standards, export controls, and audit requirements. Establish high-quality documentation, system standards, and configuration controls. What You'll Bring Proven experience leading major SAP upgrade or S/4HANA transformation programmes. Expert knowledge of core SAP modules (e.g., PP, MM, QM, SD, FI/CO) and integration technologies (BAPIs, IDocs, APIs). Strong background in SAP integration with PLM and MES environments. Experience working in highly regulated or defence/aerospace industries. Exceptional stakeholder management, communication, and leadership skills. Strong understanding of cybersecurity, configuration control, and compliance frameworks. Experience with SAP EWM, IBP, or SAP Cloud products. Knowledge of digital thread, model-based engineering, and Industry 4.0 principles. Project management certification (PMP, PRINCE2, Agile). Experience with classified system environments. Security Clearance This role is subject to pre-employment screening in line with the UK Government’s Baseline Personnel Security Standard (BPSS). An additional range of Personnel Security Controls referred to as National Security Vetting (NSV) may apply, this could include meeting the eligibility requirements for The Security Check (SC) or Developed Vetting (DV). For more information and guidance please visit https //careers.uk.leonardo.com/gb/en/security-and-vetting Why join us At Leonardo, our people are at the heart of everything we do. We offer a comprehensive, company-funded benefits package that supports your wellbeing, career development, and work–life balance. Whether you're looking to grow professionally, care for your health, or plan for the future, we’re here to help you thrive. Time to Recharge Enjoy generous leave with the opportunity to accrue up to 12 additional flexi-days each year. Secure your Future Benefit from our award-winning pension scheme with up to 15% employer contribution. Your Wellbeing Matters Free access to mental health support, financial advice, and employee-led networks championing inclusion and diversity (Enable, Pride, Equalise, Armed Forces, Carers, Wellbeing and Ethnicity). Rewarding Performance All employees at management level and below are eligible for our bonus scheme. Never Stop Learning Free access to 4,000+ online courses via Coursera and LinkedIn Learning. Refer a friend Receive a financial reward through our referral programme. Tailored Perks Spend up to £500 annually on flexible benefits including private healthcare, dental, family cover, tech & lifestyle discounts, gym memberships and more. Flexible working Flexible hours with hybrid working options. For part time opportunities, please talk to us about what might be possible for this role. For a full list of our company benefits please visit our website. Leonardo is a global leader in Aerospace, Defence, and Security. Headquartered in Italy, we employ over 53,000 people worldwide including 8,500 across 9 sites in the UK. Our employees are not just part of a team—they are key contributors to shaping innovation, advancing technology, and enhancing global safety. At Leonardo we are committed to building an inclusive, accessible, and welcoming workplace. We believe that a diverse workforce sparks creativity, drives innovation, and leads to better outcomes for our people and our customers. If you have any accessibility requirements to support you during the recruitment process, just let us know. Primary Location GB - Edinburgh Additional Locations GB - Basildon, GB - Luton - Cap. Green 300, GB - Southampton Contract Type Permanent Hybrid Working Hybrid Show more Show less Seniority level Mid-Senior level Employment type Full-time Job function Information Technology Industries Defense and Space Manufacturing, Aviation and Aerospace Component Manufacturing, and Computer and Network Security Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Leonardo by 2x See who you know

title: Assembly Operator
description: Anteryon: We believe in partnerships. In early-stage involvement, co-development, creating value and shifting forward together. We have a crystal clear vision. We work transparently and share our talent, knowledge and skills. We are driven to find out how the world works. Eager to innovate, design, optimize and spark new growth. For all of our team members and customers. We are an innovative high-tech company serving global industrial clients. We design and manufacture high-tech optical assemblies and optical precision elements for the semicon and photonics markets. We leverage our state of the art and proprietary core technology to create win-win solutions that offer people and planet more perspective. The Job As an Assembly Operator at Anteryon, you will be responsible for producing high-quality precision elements such as sensors, scanners, and laser modules. You will work in a cleanroom environment, ensuring that all work meets the highest quality and safety standards. Tasks and responsibilities You assemble components into laser modules, scanners, and sensors in a cleanroom. You perform process controls using measuring equipment to ensure everything meets specifications. You register your work in the ERP system to ensure proper traceability. You maintain quality by identifying deviations and suggesting improvements. You contribute to improvement projects (LEAN) by optimizing processes. We are looking for You have experience in a production environment (cleanroom) and possess fine motor skills. You work accurately and quality-oriented, with a strong affinity for technology. You are motivated, eager to learn, stress-resistant, and disciplined. Experience with microscopy, soldering, or optical assembly is a plus. You have good communication skills in English. We offer A good start salary. 25 vacation days and 5 additional leave days (with the option to purchase up to 8 extra days). The opportunity to work at a highly innovative company where you learn something new every day. An extensive benefits package, including a generous pension plan. A ‘Culture Club’ that organizes various activities for the staff. The position is based in Eindhoven. Would you like to be part of a dynamic, specialized, and innovative high-tech company? Send your application to Loek Charpentier(HRM@anteryon.com) with your CV and motivation letter. A reference check may be part of the selection process. Acquisition by recruitment agencies is not desired. title: SAP S/4 Development Specialist
description: Shimano is a global leader in cycling and fishing components, contributing to recreation and sports at every level. With a strong heritage built on innovation and trust, we continuously strive to improve our products, processes, and ways of working. As a technical specialist, you will play a key role in supporting and advising our internal customers. You combine in-depth technical experience with an advising role towards the customer and a supporting and coaching role towards your peers. You will work closely with business stakeholders and IT teams to design, implement, and optimize solutions that ensure high-quality, scalable, and secure business operations. The Challenge Translate business needs into technical specifications and collaborate with functional IT teams to deliver effective solutions Configure, build, integrate, and optimize processes within S/4HANA End responsible for the technical quality of custom SAP solutions Safeguarding architectural decisions, code standards and delivery within the development lifecycle Ensure seamless integration with peripheral systems Participate in the full IT development lifecycle: design, configuration, development, testing, and deployment Contribute to large and complex ERP projects, ensuring quality, consistency, and alignment with business requirements Apply ITIL best practices to maintain and improve IT services and processes Facilitate business process design sessions and document processes using BPMN or similar methodologies Develop and implement improvements to strengthen IT process controls and system security Collaborate with multiple stakeholders across functions and manage competing priorities in a dynamic environment Who we are looking for Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or equivalent 5+ years of experience as an SAP Technical Consultant in ABAP development and support in SAP ECC or S/4HANA Experience with SAP ECC or S/4HANA implementation and configuration Experience in integration with other applications and external platforms (e.g. SAP BTP) Technical knowledge of ABAP on HANA, CDS, BRF+, RAP, Adobe Forms, BPA, Fiori and OData is a plus Understanding of IT development lifecycle methodologies and ITIL best practices Experience with process modeling (BPMN, EPC, BPEL) Proven experience working on complex enterprise or ERP projects Strong analytical skills and ability to solve complex problems Ability to manage stakeholders and work both independently and in teams High customer orientation with excellent communication skills Fluent in English (written and spoken) Certification in Lean, Six Sigma, or Scrum is a plus Ability to work in a structured way while safeguarding quality What do we offer Shimano and its subsidiaries offer a pleasant, informal working environment with colleagues who work well together, and are proud to work for Shimano. Next to good working conditions, Shimano offers you the opportunity to work in a responsible and challenging position within a dynamic, international and ambitious environment. Together we want to win therefore we have a strong focus on team achievement. title: SAP® Junior Consultant (m/w/d)
description: Vollzeit SAP® Junior Consultant (m/w/d) flag Ellerbek devices Homeoffice möglich alarm 38 h Startseite Karriere SAP® Junior Consultant (m/w/d) Die Blohm Consulting GmbH mit Sitz in Ellerbek bei Hamburg wurde 1986 gegründet und ist ein erfolgreiches SAP-Beratungs- und Softwarehaus. Unser Schwerpunkt liegt in der Logistik, dem Vertrieb, der Produktion und dem Rechnungswesen mit allen betroffenen SAP-Komponenten. Als langfristiger Partner betreuen wir unsere Kunden in nationalen und internationalen Projekten sowie im laufenden Betrieb. Zur Verstärkung unseres Teams suchen wir einen SAP® Junior Consultant (m/w/d) zur Festanstellung. Ihre Aufgaben Mitarbeit in interessanten Logistikprojekten ABAP-Programmierung und Customizing Konzeption und Lösung von Entwicklungsaufgaben / Kundenanforderungen Konzeption, Test und Realisierung von Schnittstellen, Anbindung externer Systeme Ihr Profil erfolgreicher Studien- oder Berufsabschluss im Bereich IT erste SAP-Erfahrungen während des Studiums / Praktika Programmierkenntnisse gute englische Sprachkenntnisse strukturiertes und teamorientiertes Arbeiten Eigenmotivation und Lernbereitschaft Das bieten wir Ihnen Wir arbeiten in kreativen, hochmotivierten Teams aus qualifizierten und berufserfahrenen SAP-Beratern und bieten Ihnen ein attraktives Gehalt und ein ungezwungenes Betriebsklima. Sie werden sorgfältig eingearbeitet und in einem auf Ihren Qualifikationen und Interessen passenden Modul sowie ABAP / ABAP OO geschult und erhalten zum Projekteinstieg kompetente Betreung. Der Einsatz erfolgt zumeist wohnortnah im norddeutschen Raum, auf Wunsch auch international. Remote-Arbeit ist für uns alltäglich. Haben wir Ihr Interesse geweckt? title: Merchandiser
description: Job Overview We are seeking a highly skilled, full-time Interior Design Studio (IDS) Coordinator to serve as the critical bridge between our internal, interior designers, retail stores, vendors, and our supply chain. The ideal candidate should possess 8 to 10 years of technical expertise in solid wood furniture manufacturing, curtains, blinds, and wallpaper. You will manage the entire customization workflow—from interpreting technical drawings to overseeing regional production and ensuring flawless delivery. Required Software Skill AutoCAD: Competent in reading, interpreting, and verifying technical layouts, furniture joinery, technical details, and architectural drawings Advanced MS Excel: Experienced in building formulas for material consumption, managing cost sheets, and maintaining live order tracking reports SAP: Proficient in generating custom article codes, creating production orders, and managing procurement data . Key Technical Qualifications Material Expertise: Strong knowledge of solid wood properties, furniture manufacturing process, hardware, and fabric Technical Estimation: Proficiency in fabric calculation, wallpaper scaling, and window blind and curtain mechanisms & Hardware Commercial Acumen: Clear understanding of costing parameters for both custom furniture and soft furnishing Cost negotiation to attain the required targeted GP, perform a thorough cost breakdown analysis to systematic reduce the supplier cost Core Responsibilit es 1. Business Development & Revenue Growth Channel Expansion: Pitch ongoing product catalogues and customisation capabilities to interior designers and external designer/architect to secure maximum market share Designer Engagement: Build and maintain long-term professional relationships with store and IDS designers Upselling: Proactively suggest custom offerings (e.g., matching wallpaper or upholstery fabric) to increase the average order value 2. Communication & Vendor Management Rigorous Follow-ups: Conduct structured, daily operational follow-ups with regional team and vendors to track manufacturing progress against timelines Feedback Loops: Maintain clear, transparent communication channels between the design studio, internal stakeholder teams and vendors to eliminate errors Vendor Reviews: Hold monthly performance and delivery timeline reviews with vendor partners to improve supply chain reliability 3. Technical Design Liaison & Estimation Drawing Verification: Review AutoCAD drawings from designers to ensure structural and technical feasibility before production begins Material Calculation: Convert site measurements into precise fabric, wallpaper, and wood consumption data using Excel models Material Advisory: Guide designers and customers on appropriate fabrics, wallpaper textures, and furniture finishes. 4. End-to-End Order Management System Execution: Manage day-to-day data input in SAP to create codes for new custom items and trigger formal production Data Tracking: Maintain an updated master tracking sheet in Excel to monitor milestones from production to dispatch Timeline Enforcement: Coordinate daily with internal teams and external vendors to guarantee on-time delivery. 5. Vendor Development (Jaipur / Jodhpur Region) Vendor Sourcing: Build, onboard, and expand a reliable vendor base for custom solid wood furniture in the Jaipur and Jodhpur re Commercial Terms: Establish pricing structures, negotiate margins, and evaluate vendor performance. 6. Quality Assurance & Coordination Specification Matching: Verify that the final physical product matches the approved technical drawings and designer specs Quality Control: Inspect final finishes, including solid wood polishing, pleat styles, stitching quality, and upholstery tension. title: Programa de Talentos - Assistente de Dados
description: Fundada em 2004, a Incodata é uma empresa com alcance nacional que reúne especialistas em consultoria, projetos e implementação de Soluções em Gestão, Integração, Ciência de Dados e Inteligência Analítica. Nossa equipe é capacitada para realizar análises ágeis de volumes significativos de informações, utilizando ferramentas adotadas por 40% das maiores corporações globais. Venha fazer parte desse grande time! PROJETO FORMANDO TALENTOS INCODATA Buscamos pessoas apaixonadas por TI e dispostas a se desenvolverem nas soluções Alteryx como Especialistas na ferramenta. Oportunidade para atuar no modelo híbrido (Florianópolis/SC). OBJETIVO Capacitar-se na Trilha de Conhecimento e Certificações da Alteryx. ATIVIDADES Dedicar-se aos estudos das ferramentas Alteryx, com cadência e engajamento; Ser mentorado pelos orientadores, entregando tarefas propostas como resultados do aprendizado; Interagir com a equipe de treinandos com o objetivo de trocar dúvidas e buscar a máxima eficiência do aprendizado; Após os treinamentos iniciais, interagir com projetos para experimentar na prática a aplicação da teoria. REQUISITOS Perfil curioso, inquieto, comunicativo, autogerenciável e executor; Curso Técnico na área de Tecnologia da Informação ou estar cursando Ensino Superior em TI (Redes, Análise de Sistemas, Engenharia da Computação e áreas afins), preferencialmente em fase final da graduação; Foco em análise de dados e conhecimentos em ferramentas de BI; Inglês em nível intermediário. title: PESSOA ESPECIALISTA DE SISTEMA - SAP MM
description: Crescer juntos sempre foi nosso jeito! As pessoas são a força do nosso trabalho. A soma das nossas diferenças, com colaboração, criatividade e aprendizado contínuo, impulsionam voos mais altos. Venha fazer parte do nosso time e nos ajude a transformar o universo lácteo . #VemSerAlvoarLácteos Responsabilidades e atribuições Configurar e parametrizar o módulo SAP MM (S/4HANA), abrangendo processos de compras, cadastro de materiais, gestão de estoque e determinação de preços. Conduzir workshops para levantamento de requisitos e elaborar especificações funcionais. Apoiar projetos de migração e conversão ECC → S/4HANA, realizando validação de dados mestres e adequações às simplificações do módulo MM. Garantir a integração dos processos de MM com os módulos SD, PP, FI/CO, QM e LE. Assegurar a conformidade fiscal dos processos de suprimentos, incluindo NF-e, DRC, CFOP, TAXBRA e Reforma Tributária (IBS/CBS). Planejar e executar testes integrados, além de apoiar atividades de sustentação do sistema. Atuar em parceria com a HMIT na execução do Programa Transforma, reportando os avanços à Coordenação de Sistemas SAP. Contribuir para a governança, evolução e melhoria contínua dos processos SAP relacionados à cadeia de suprimentos. Requisitos e qualificações Ensino superior completo em Tecnologia da Informação, Engenharia, Administração ou áreas correlatas. Experiência como Especialista Funcional SAP MM, com participação em pelo menos um ciclo de implementação ou migração para SAP S/4HANA. Conhecimento em Procure-to-Pay (P2P), Gestão de Materiais, localização brasileira (TAXBRA, NF-e e CFOP) e integração com os módulos SD, PP e FI/CO. Inglês intermediário ou avançado. Conhecimento em SAP DRC, Fiori Apps, ABAP básico, Reforma Tributária (IBS/CBS) e processos de industrialização por terceiros. Certificação SAP MM ou SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement. Competências: Comunicação, Foco no Cliente, Iniciativa, Foco em Resultado, Resiliência, Agilidade e Inovação. title: BESTFORMATION recherche un formateur / consultant ERP-SAP freelance
description: Dans le cadre du développement de notre offre de formation, BESTFORMATION recherche un formateur ou consultant freelance spécialisé en ERP / SAP pour intervenir sur une formation d’ initiation à l’environnement ERP/SAP destinée à un public débutant ou intermédiaire. 🎯 Objectif de la formation : Accompagner les apprenants dans la compréhension des bases d’un ERP, la découverte de l’environnement SAP, des principaux modules métiers et des processus utilisés en entreprise. ✅ Thèmes abordés : Comprendre le rôle d’un ERP dans l’organisation de l’entreprise Découvrir l’environnement SAP et sa logique de navigation Identifier les principaux modules SAP : FI, CO, MM, SD, achats, ventes, stocks, comptabilité Comprendre les flux métier : client, commande, livraison, facturation, comptabilité Acquérir le vocabulaire professionnel lié aux ERP et à SAP Réaliser des cas pratiques simples adaptés à un public débutant 👤 Profil recherché : Expérience professionnelle sur SAP ou ERP Maîtrise d’un ou plusieurs modules SAP : FI, CO, MM, SD, logistique, achats ou finance Expérience en formation, accompagnement utilisateurs ou conduite du changement Capacité à vulgariser les notions pour un public non expert Possibilité d’intervenir à distance en visio Statut freelance apprécié 📍 Modalités : Formation à distance Mission ponctuelle, collaboration possible sur plusieurs sessions Public : salariés, personnes en reconversion, profils administratifs, comptables, ADV, achats ou logistique 📩 Les personnes intéressées peuvent me contacter en message privé ou envoyer leur CV, leurs domaines d’expertise SAP/ERP et leurs disponibilités à : recrutement@bestformation.fr Bien cordialement, Anis BEN SALAH BESTFORMATION 🌐 www.bestformation.fr

title: Marketing & Growth Manager H/F
description: On a lancé RandomCoffee en 2018 avec l’ambition d’offrir un moyen simple et efficace pour casser les silos dans les entreprises. Incubés à Dauphine , chez Facebook au Startup Garage à Station F , et chez SAP , on s’est rapidement développé durant ces 3 premières années, et RandomCoffee s’est installé comme étant LA référence pour créer du lien entre collaborateurs d’une même entreprise, avec des clients comme Spotify , Twitter , TikTok , EY ou Total . Aujourd’hui, on est à un véritable tournant de la vie de RandomCoffee : on souhaite aller plus loin et lancer un nouveau produit encore plus ambitieux et structurant pour nos clients. Pour y arriver, on est à la recherche de personnes très motivées, capables de nous aider à passer à la vitesse supérieure, en consolidant toujours plus RandomCoffee, et en nous aidant à relever le challenge de construire et lancer un nouveau produit ultra ambitieux. Si ça te parle, n’attends plus, postule, RandomCoffee est fait pour toi ! Vos missions Tu travailleras en lien direct avec l'équipe fondatrice sur les sujets growth marketing , communication et acquisition , avec un vrai terrain d’expression pour tester et apprendre : 📈 Growth & Lead Gen Lancement de campagnes outbound ciblées (emailing, LinkedIn outreach, séquences automatisées) Suivi et A/B testing des séquences Qualif & nurturing de leads via Hubspot, Intercom, ou CustomerIo Suivi analytique des performances et reporting 💌 Newsletters & Réseaux sociaux Création de contenus pour LinkedIn, en lien avec nos actus, offres, tendances RH & Tech Création, envoi et optimisation des newsletters (CustomerIo ou Hubspot) Suivi des KPIs de performance : taux d’ouverture, clics, impressions, conversion, etc. 🎪 Événements & Salons Participation à l'organisation des événements Tech/RH, en ligne ou physiques Gestion logistique, communication avant/après événement Activation sur les salons (en amont et pendant) 🧱 Contenu, SEO & Webflow Publication & édition de pages A/B testées sur Webflow Optimisation SEO de contenus (blog, pages produit, etc.) et suivi et A/B testing via Webflow Création d’assets marketing (landing pages, visuels) 👥 Community & Design (Bonus mais très bien vu) Animation des réseaux Facebook, Instagram, X Création graphique via Figma, Canva ou outils similaires Participation à la création de supports visuels (guides, templates, pubs) Vos compétences Tu es curieux, analytique et autonome Tu maîtrises ou es à l’aise avec certains outils : Hubspot, Intercom, Webflow, Customerio Tu es capable de poser une logique d’analytics claire (pas juste faire, mais comprendre pourquoi et améliorer) Tu as le sens du contenu et une appétence pour le design ou le branding Tu es attiré par l’univers startup , avec une vraie culture du test & learn Avantages Une immersion complète dans l’écosystème Growth / RH / Tech Des outils et méthodes modernes De l’autonomie, du coaching, et un vrai impact visible Un bonus possible si tu fais title: Senior Consultant - SAP FI/CO - Manufacturing (m/w/d)
description: Standort: Hybrid (Remote bzw. mit projektbezogenen Kundeneinsätzen vor Ort: Frankfurt, München, Hamburg, Köln, Düsseldorf, Berlin, Stuttgart) Level: Senior Consultant/ Principal/ Senior Principal Über uns Where Innovation meets Excellence. Werden Sie Teil einer weltweit renommierten Managementberatung an der Spitze industrieller Transformation. Wir sind eine mittelgroße Beratung mit unternehmerischem Spirit und einer unterstützenden Kultur und arbeiten mit marktführenden Unternehmen in allen Branchen zusammen. Unsere Muttergesellschaft Infosys zählt zu den Top-5 globalen IT-Unternehmen und wächst überdurchschnittlich stark. Unser Consulting-Geschäft wird jährlich von der Financial Times und Forbes als eines der führenden Beratungsunternehmen ausgezeichnet - insbesondere aufgrund unserer Kundeninnovationen, kulturellen Vielfalt sowie der strukturierten Trainings- und Karrierepfade für unsere Beraterinnen und Berater. Wir setzen uns aktiv für eine inklusive Unternehmenskultur ein, die alle Mitarbeitenden dazu befähigt, ihr Bestes zu leisten. Das Team Unsere Manufacturing Practice definiert Geschäftsprozesse und konzipiert sowie implementiert transformative, innovative Lösungen für einige der weltweit größten Unternehmen. Ein Einstieg in unser Team bedeutet, eine gemeinsame Leidenschaft für Strategie, Architektur und modernste SAP-Technologien zu teilen. Sie arbeiten an strategischen Projekten, sind Teil eines multikulturellen, kollaborativen Teams und Ihre Leistung bleibt nicht unbemerkt. In dieser Rolle sehen Sie, wie Ihre eigenen Ideen zu messbaren Ergebnissen werden - eine echte Chance, nachhaltig etwas zu bewegen. Ihre Rolle - SAP FI/CO Consultant • Verantwortung für End-to-End-Implementierungen von SAP S/4HANA im Bereich Finance und/oder Controlling (FI/CO) • Analyse und Bewertung fachlicher Anforderungen sowie Identifikation geeigneter SAP-Funktionalitäten und Best Practices • Planung, Vorbereitung und Durchführung von Fit-Gap- bzw. Fit-to-Standard-Workshops • Solution Design sowie Unterstützung bei der Umsetzung identifizierter Gaps und Prozessverbesserungen • Durchführung von Systemintegrationstests sowie Unterstützung bei Datenmigration und Cutover-Aktivitäten • Sicherstellung der Systemimplementierung in Zusammenarbeit mit Near- und Offshore-Teams • Sparringspartner für den Kunden sowie Übernahme von Projektmanagement-Aufgaben Anforderungen Qualifikation & Erfahrung • Abgeschlossenes Hochschulstudium in Wirtschaftswissenschaften, Ingenieurwesen, Informatik oder vergleichbare Qualifikation • Mindestens 5-8 vollständige Projektzyklen im Bereich SAP FI/CO und/oder FSCM • Tiefgehende Kenntnisse von Finance- und Controlling-Geschäftsprozessen sowie Fähigkeit, fachliche Anforderungen in Systemdesigns zu übersetzen • Erfahrung in SAP S/4HANA-Projekten und/oder entsprechende Zertifizierung • Idealerweise Erfahrung in internationalen Template- und Rollout-Projekten • Teamorientierte, kommunikationsstarke Persönlichkeit mit Eigeninitiative • Sehr gute Kommunikationsfähigkeiten in Deutsch ( C2-Niveau ) und Englisch ( C2-Niveau ) in Wort und Schrift • Reisebereitschaft im projektbezogenen Umfang Benefits - Warum Infosys Consulting? Infosys Consulting befähigt Mitarbeitende aus allen Hintergründen, sich fachlich und persönlich weiterzuentwickeln und sichtbaren Impact zu schaffen - intern wie extern. Sie werden Teil eines vielfältigen, kreativen Teams innerhalb einer hochinnovativen Beratungspraxis. Freuen Sie sich auf eine inklusive, kollaborative Unternehmenskultur, hochmotivierte Kolleginnen und Kollegen sowie ein lernorientiertes Arbeitsumfeld. Mit Ihrem Einstieg bei Infosys Consulting leisten Sie einen entscheidenden Beitrag zu unserer erfolgreichen Wachstumsstory - und wir freuen uns darauf, diesen Weg gemeinsam mit Ihnen zu gehen. title: SAP Basis & Technical Application Expert (m/w/d)
description: Als Spezialist in der Verdauungs- und Stoffwechselmedizin und Familienunternehmen mit globaler Vernetzung, setzen wir unseren Fokus auf die Entwicklung und den Vertrieb innovativer Arzneimittel für verschiedene Erkrankungen der Leber, der Gallenwege, des Darms und der Speiseröhre, um das Leben von Menschen zu verbessern. Wir glauben daran, dass wir nur gemeinsam medizinischen Fortschritt erreichen können. Daher suchen wir: Ihre Aufgaben Sie überwachen unser SAP S/4HANA-System (Private Cloud) und stellen Systemverfügbarkeit sowie Systemperformance sicher. Sie monitoren und analysieren Standard-Systemjobs sowie Dr. Falk-spezifische Systemjobs. Sie überwachen an SAP angebundene Systeme und Schnittstellen, insbesondere im Umfeld der SAP BTP. Sie führen Business-Process-Monitoring durch und analysieren technische sowie prozessuale Auffälligkeiten. Sie planen und führen Transporte mit SAP Cloud ALM durch. Sie pflegen die Nutzerverwaltung, Rollen und Berechtigungen und führen SoD-Checks durch. Sie analysieren SAP Notes und pflegen diese bei Bedarf ein. Sie übernehmen Third-Level-SAP-IT-Support Aufgaben Sie stimmen Incidents mit SAP ab und bearbeiten entsprechende Tickets. Sie analysieren und bewerten regelmäßig SAP Notes. title: SAP Manager
description: About us: Join a fast-growing global technology organisation focused on improving complex international supply chains. In this role, you will apply your expertise to support innovative solutions that enhance efficiency, compliance, and operational performance across highly regulated and logistics-intensive industries. Role Overview: Responsible for leading a global team of SAP Functional Consultants and overseeing the successful delivery of SAP implementation and transformation projects. This role combines people leadership, SAP functional expertise, and delivery governance to ensure high-quality project execution, strong customer outcomes, and operational excellence across multiple engagements. Key Responsibilities: Lead, coach, and develop a globally distributed team of SAP Functional Consultants. Oversee the functional delivery of SAP implementation projects, ensuring clear scope, effective planning, and successful execution. Act as the primary escalation point for delivery risks, project challenges, and customer-impacting issues. Partner with cross-functional teams including Project Management, Product, Technical, Data, Customer Success, and Support to deliver successful project outcomes. Ensure the delivery of high-quality SAP functional services, including requirements gathering, business process design, solution configuration, testing, user training, and go-live readiness. Drive resource planning, utilisation management, and continuous improvement initiatives to optimise delivery performance. Establish and maintain delivery governance, implementation standards, methodologies, templates, and best practices to support scalable and consistent project delivery. Skills and Experience: Strong SAP functional consulting expertise with experience delivering enterprise-wide SAP solutions. Proven track record of leading customer-facing SAP implementation and consulting teams. Experience managing global or geographically distributed teams. Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, communication, and problem-solving skills. Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities and deliver high-quality outcomes. Customer-focused, analytical, and data-driven approach to delivery and continuous improvement. We offer: Competitive bonus scheme Flexible working hours to support work–life balance 30 days of annual leave Free breakfast provided in the office Strong focus on training and continuous professional development opportunities Trust-based working culture with a high degree of autonomy and responsibility Collaborative, supportive international team environment Additional contact details alexp@energizerec.com Show more Show less Seniority level Mid-Senior level Employment type Full-time Job function Information Technology Industries Staffing and Recruiting Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Energize Group by 2x See who you know

title: SAP Data Management Lead
description: Role- SAP Data Management Lead Only W2 Candidates Location- Fremont, CA (Onsi te) JD- Role Purpose: The SAP Data Management Lead is responsible for defining, governing, and delivering end-to-end data management activities across SAP transformation, implementation, migration, and ongoing operations. The role ensures that SAP master and transactional data is accurate, complete, compliant, and fit for business use across processes, systems, and reporting landscapes. Required Skills And Experience Strong experience in SAP data management, SAP data migration, master data governance, or enterprise data quality management. Hands-on understanding of SAP master data and transactional data across areas such as Finance, Procurement, Sales, Supply Chain, Manufacturing, Plant Maintenance, or Enterprise Asset Management. Experience with SAP S/4HANA transformation programmes, including migration strategy, data object planning, mock load cycles, reconciliation, and cutover readiness. Hands on experience in SAP data migration and governance tools such as SAP Migration Cockpit, SAP Data Services, Syniti, LSMW, SAP MDG, ETL platforms, SQL, or data quality tools. Ability to define data standards, ownership models, data quality rules, exception handling, and governance controls. Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret complex datasets, identify root causes, and drive practical remediation actions. Excellent stakeholder management, communication, facilitation, and leadership skills across business and technology teams. Experience managing delivery teams, coordinating multiple workstreams, and operating in complex global or multi-country programme environments. Qualifications Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Data Management, Engineering, Business, or a related discipline. Typically 15+ years of experience in SAP data management, SAP migration, SAP implementation, or enterprise data governance roles. Relevant SAP certifications, SAP S/4HANA experience, data governance certifications, or project management qualifications are advantageous Key Responsibilities Lead SAP data management strategy, governance, standards, and execution across SAP ECC, SAP S/4HANA, and integrated enterprise systems. Own data migration planning and delivery, including data extraction, profiling, cleansing, mapping, transformation, validation, reconciliation, and load readiness. Define and enforce data quality rules, controls, issue management processes, and governance workflows across master data and transactional data objects. Partner with business process owners, functional teams, technical teams, and system integrators to confirm data scope, ownership, dependencies, and acceptance criteria. Drive data readiness for mock loads, cutover cycles, user acceptance testing, go-live, and post-go-live stabilisation. Establish data migration and data governance documentation, including object inventories, mapping specifications, validation rules, reconciliation reports, and audit evidence. Monitor data risks, defects, dependencies, and remediation actions, ensuring timely escalation and resolution. Lead workshops with business and technology stakeholders to align data requirements with process, reporting, integration, and compliance needs. Provide leadership, coaching, and quality assurance for data analysts, migration consultants, functional SMEs, and offshore or nearshore delivery teams. Continuously improve data management practices by introducing reusable templates, automation opportunities, data quality dashboards, and best-practice standards. Good understanding of SAP archiving Skills: data migration,data management,cockpit,lsmw,mdg,s/4hana Show more Show less Seniority level Mid-Senior level Employment type Contract Job function Information Technology Industries IT Services and IT Consulting Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Mega Cloud Lab by 2x See who you know

title: ERP Analyst
description: Job Description The ERP Analyst will serve as the primary internal resource for our business as we embark on our SAP S4/HANA journey. The ERP Analyst will work closely with our regional SAP team and serve as the on-site “go-to” for day-to-day SAP support, enhancements, and continuous improvement of business processes enabled by SAP. The ERP Analyst’s role is to maintain and improve efficient information systems and operations systems in support of core organizational functions. This individual will apply proven communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills to identify, communicate, and resolve systems issues to maximize the benefits of IT system investments. Responsibilities Support the day-to-day operation of the SAP S/4HANA ERP system Ownership of incident resolution (1st level), root-cause analysis, and coordination with SAP support and the regional SAP experts for more complex issues Manage and execute system enhancements, configurations, and process improvements in SAP S/4HANA and related systems Work closely with production/manufacturing, inventory, planning, logistics, and finance teams to align SAP system usage with business operations Serve as the liaison between business functions (manufacturing, supply chain, procurement, finance, sales/distribution) and the SAP support team to ensure that system functionality aligns with business needs Coordinate setup, maintenance, and troubleshoot issues related to EDI and customer-specific label requirements Document business processes, system flows, and configurations; assist with change-management (user training, process documentation, SOPs) Monitor system performance, identify opportunities for optimization (e.g., master-data cleanup, process redesign, reporting enhancements) Partner with regional experts and third-party consultants to ensure best practices, compliance with standards, and knowledge transfer to the business Participate in periodic reviews of system functionality, evaluate new SAP modules/add-ons, and recommend improvements Maintain system access and ensure proper separation of duties exists Position Requirements Formal Education & Certification College diploma or university degree in the field of computer science, information science, management information systems, or business administration, and 4 years of related work experience. Knowledge & Experience Experience in systems analysis or business systems support in a manufacturing setting is required, Automotive industry preferred Experience working with ERP systems; direct exposure to SAP (especially S/4HANA) is a strong plus Solid understanding of manufacturing operations (e.g., production, inventory, supply chain, procurement, quality) and how they integrate with ERP systems Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills, with the ability to translate between business users and technical teams Strong documentation skills (process flows, functional specs, testing scripts). Comfortable working independently (given you’ll be the only ERP Analyst on site) but also capable of collaborating with remote/regional SAP experts Willingness to engage in change management, user training, and continuous process improvement Experience supporting automotive EDI preferred SAP certification (e.g., SAP S/4HANA Associate) or equivalent preferred Personal Attributes Good project management skills Excellent written and oral communication skills Excellent listening and interpersonal skills Ability to conduct research into systems issues and products as required Ability to communicate ideas in both technical and user-friendly language Highly self-motivated and directed Keen attention to detail Proven analytical, critical thinking, and creative problem-solving abilities Ability to effectively prioritize and execute tasks in a high-pressure environment. Strong customer service orientation. Experience working in a team-oriented, collaborative environment. ITW is an equal opportunity employer. We value our colleagues’ unique perspectives, experiences and ideas and create workplaces where everyone can develop their careers and perform to their full potential. As an equal employment opportunity employer, ITW is committed to equal employment opportunity and fair treatment for employees, beginning with the hiring process and continuing through all aspects of the employment relationship. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, age, disability, protected Veteran status or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws. title: Test Manager SAP
description: Rejoignez notre entreprise internationale de conseil et de services en IT. Chez Itecor, vous êtes au centre de tout ce que nous faisons. Nos communautés de pratique permettent à nos consultants d'exceller dans leurs domaines, garantissant ainsi une valeur inégalée à nos prestigieux clients. Nous nous engageons à vous faire grandir dans vos compétences professionnelles et interpersonnelles. Nous cultivons une approche éthique et socialement responsable des affaires et des personnes. Nous valorisons la pensée créative, l'authenticité et la qualité. Prêt à rejoindre notre communauté ? Rejoignez l'aventure Itecor et devenez notre nouveau collègue. Nous recherchons un Test Manager Senior expérimenté, capable de piloter l'ensemble du cycle de test dans un environnement complexe et international. Il évoluera dans un contexte international exigeant avec des systèmes SAP critiques et des enjeux forts de qualité, performance et fiabilité. Vos missions 🛠 Définir et mettre en œuvre la stratégie de test globale Garantir la couverture fonctionnelle et technique des tests notamment dans le cadre de projets SAP critiques Mettre en place les KPI et assurer le suivi de la qualité Participer aux décisions de Go / No-Go Gestion d'équipe Encadrer une équipe composée d'un testeur fonctionnel, d'un automaticien et d'un expert en tests de performance Planifier, prioriser et coordonner les activités de test Assurer la montée en compétences de l'équipe Participer activement aux phases de test Superviser les campagnes de tests automatisés et de performance Gérer les anomalies et leur résolution UAT & Collaboration métier Organiser et animer les sessions de User Acceptance Testing (UAT) Collaborer avec les key users et end users Garantir l'alignement entre les besoins métiers et les livrables IT, Contribuer aux processus de release management Assurer la qualité des livraisons en production Gérer les risques liés aux déploiements Votre profil 👀 Minimum 8 ans d'expérience en test logiciel, incluant une expertise confirmée en gestion des tests Connaisse obligatoire des environnements SAP Maîtrise des environnements suivants : Azure DevOps, Tosca, NeoLoad, ainsi que des outils de gestion des tests et des anomalies Une expérience en automatisation (BDD, Gherkin, Selenium, Cucumber, JUnit, Java) constituera un atout Connaissances approfondies en tests backend, notamment sur les API et services web Une expérience en tests de performance sera appréciée Capacité démontrée à allier vision stratégique et approche opérationnelle Leadership affirmé, excellentes compétences en communication et aptitude à la coordination Solides capacités d'analyse et de résolution de problèmes Expérience avérée dans des environnements exigeants Autonomie, esprit d'initiative et forte orientation vers les résultats Maîtrise indispensable du français et de l'anglais Itecor, trusted advisor for your digital transformation Itecor est une entreprise internationale de conseil et de services en technologies numériques sur-mesure, dont le siège est en Suisse. En tant que trusted advisor, nous donnons vie aux visions de nos clients par la transformation digitale. Nous comptons quelque 240 employés répartis dans 8 bureaux (Vevey, Genève, Zurich, Paris, Barcelone, Skopje, Mexico, Durango). Nous sommes spécialisés dans la gouvernance, l'implémentation de solutions numériques et l'assurance qualité. Être proche de nos clients, fournir des services à haute valeur ajoutée, incarner l'innovation appliquée et mettre nos collaborateurs en capacité de donner le meilleur d'eux-mêmes : voilà ce qui nous habite depuis plus de 30 ans. Nous répondons aux défis de secteurs variés, de la finance à l'industrie et aux services publics. Notre approche combine excellence, responsabilité d'entreprise, et relations durables ; elle s'appuie sur un solide savoir-faire d'entreprise. Pour en savoir plus sur Itecor en vidéo : what makes itecor unique - YouTube Rejoignez une communauté qui valorise le savoir, qui fait preuve d'audace et qui vous inspirera. Créons ensemble un monde numérique meilleur et plus riche de sens. Nous vous informons que seuls les candidats sélectionnés recevront une réponse. Nous vous remercions de votre compréhension. title: SAP Consultant (w/m/d)
description: Cross ALM GmbH ist ein führendes Unternehmen im Bereich der IT-und Prozess-Beratung. Unterstütze mit uns Mittelstands- und Enterprise-Unternehmen dabei Ihre IT-Prozesswelt zu optimieren. Neben unserer Beratung bieten wir auch Softwarelösungen an, die Business- und IT-Abteilungen unserer Kunden zu besserer Zusammenarbeit verhelfen. Vor allem die Kombination unseres Know-Hows im Bereich SAP, Atlassian und Service Now machen uns einzigartig. Unsere Mission: Wir ermöglichen die Zusammenarbeit zwischen Business und IT, da wir fest davon überzeugt sind, dass Kommunikation und die richtige Einstellung der beste Weg sind, um Innovation und Geschäftserfolg voranzutreiben. Unsere Arbeitskultur: Wir sind Fans vom selbstständigen Arbeiten, plane deinen Tag nach deinen Präferenzen. Unsere Mitarbeiter hören zu, machen Fehler, arbeiten zusammen und entwickeln sich kontinuierlich weiter. Wir lieben Herausforderungen und unterstützen unsere Kunden bei der Implementierung und Erweiterung ihrer SAP-Landschaft durch den Einsatz verschiedener Tools wie den SAP Solution Manager, Cloud ALM und Jira. Teammitglieder, unter Berücksichtigung der Jira-, SAP Solution Manager- und Cloud ALM-Funktionalitäten Enge Zusammenarbeit mit Kunden, um ihre individuellen Anforderungen zu verstehen und maßgeschneiderte Lösungen anzubieten, basierend auf Jira, SAP Solution Manager und Cloud ALM Kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung des eigenen Fachwissens im Bereich ALM, insbesondere im Hinblick auf Jira, SAP Solution Manager und Cloud ALM Qualifikation Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse Abgeschlossenes Studium der Informatik, Wirtschaftsinformatik oder eine vergleichbare Ausbildung insbesondere Jira, SAP Solution Manager und Cloud ALM Erfahrung in der Implementierung und Konfiguration des SAP Solution Managers, sowie Jira und Cloud ALM Hohe Kundenorientierung und Beratungskompetenz Wir suchen einen lösungsorientierten Teamplayer mit innovativem Mindset und Liebe zum Detail, der mit uns den Status Quo hinterfragt, um gemeinsam mit uns zu wachsen Benefits Spannende Projekte in einem dynamischen Umfeld namhafter Kunden, bei denen Jira, SAP Solution Manager und Cloud ALM kombiniert eingesetzt werden Möglichkeit, die eigene Expertise im Bereich ALM weiter auszubauen und innovative Lösungen zu entwickeln, basierend auf Jira, SAP Solution Manager und Cloud ALM Ein motiviertes und engagiertes Team, das gemeinsam an herausfordernden Projekten arbeitet 30 title: SAP Banking Senior Consultant
description: Are you an experienced SAP Banking Senior Consultant looking for an exciting opportunity to influence the future of banking? As an SAP Banking Senior Consultant, you will be a key player in our company, bridging the gap between specialist departments and IT to optimize core business processes with innovative SAP solutions. On Offer: Join a vibrant workplace recognized as "the best employer in Germany," fostering creativity, collaboration, and a strong commitment to work-life balance and employee well-being. Salaries up to 100k for a Senior Consultant, a company car, and a comprehensive range of additional benefits with dedicated family support. Enjoy minimal travel requirements with over 34 office locations in Germany and 31 across Europe, along with an impressive company car package. Work from anywhere in Europe, with the flexibility to work up to 165 days per year from anywhere in the EU. Access clear routes to promotion at every level, reviewed annually, and benefit from extensive training opportunities to enhance both specialist knowledge and soft skills. Utilize a training hub offering 360+ courses to develop your expertise and competencies in various areas. Your Role: Support leading banking and insurance companies in optimizing their core business processes using SAP Banking, Core Banking and S/4HANA. Provide expert advice on the integration and implementation of SAP DM, PE, BCA, CML, CMS, and FS-BP modules, developing strategies to enhance efficiency and effectiveness. Analyze and model business processes to create innovative and efficient solutions in the banking and insurance sectors. Lead project teams in implementing concepts into functional application systems, ensuring quality and alignment with business goals. Your Skills: Completed degree in business administration, insurance management, business informatics, or equivalent in-company training with a focus on banking, insurance, or IT. Several years of experience in consulting and/or SAP environment with expertise in: SAP Banking, SAP Bank Analyzer, SAP CML or SAP CMS. Banking and insurance processes and systems Integration with other SAP modules (FI, CO, SD, MM) Familiarity with ABAP, debugging, and programming experience is a plus. C1 level proficiency in German and fluency in English. For more information or to discuss an application, please apply here or send a CV and covering letter to paulo.ranalli@ignitesap.com . For our client, a well-established company in Germany, we are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented Accountant to join their finance and accounting team. Salary Range: €50,000 – €80,000 per annum + Bonus (depending on experience and qualifications) Location: Germany (Multiple Locations) - On-site / Hybrid (depending on company requirements) Your Responsibilities:- Maintain accurate financial records and ensure proper bookkeeping in accordance with German accounting standards. Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable processes. Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements. Reconcile bank accounts and general ledger balances. Support budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning activities. Ensure compliance with German GAAP (HGB) and tax regulations. Assist with audits and liaise with external auditors and tax advisors. Prepare VAT returns and other statutory financial reports Monitor financial transactions and identify discrepancies Your Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Business Administration, or a related field. Proven experience as an Accountant, Financial Accountant, or Bookkeeper. Strong knowledge of German accounting standards (HGB) and tax regulations. Experience with accounting software (e.g., DATEV, SAP, or similar systems). Good analytical and organizational skills with attention to detail. Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines. Fluent German language skills required; English is a plus. Professional certifications (e.g., Bilanzbuchhalter) are an advantage This Is What Our Client Offers You Competitive salary with performance-based bonuses. Continuous training and certification opportunities. Modern and innovative work environment. Clear career development and promotion opportunities Supportive and collaborative company culture Does this sound exciting to you? Then apply with your latest CV in PDF format. title: Technical SAP Project Manager
description: This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Technical SAP Project Manager based in Germany. This role offers the opportunity to lead critical workstreams within a large-scale global SAP RISE transformation program. As a Technical SAP Project Manager, you will drive complex migration initiatives, ensuring successful delivery across scope, timelines, budgets, and quality objectives. You will collaborate with international technical and business teams, acting as the key link between stakeholders and facilitating effective decision-making. The position requires strong project leadership combined with the ability to understand complex SAP concepts and guide execution without hands-on technical consulting. With significant visibility across global operations, this role provides the opportunity to contribute to a major digital transformation journey in an international environment. Accountabilities Lead two SAP migration workstreams, ensuring successful execution according to project scope, timeline, budget, and quality expectations. Manage SAP RISE transformation projects throughout the full project lifecycle, from initial planning through implementation and final delivery. Coordinate international cross-functional teams and facilitate collaboration between technical specialists, business stakeholders, and project partners. Participate in technical discussions by understanding proposed concepts, challenging assumptions where relevant, and supporting effective decision-making. Identify, assess, and mitigate project risks, dependencies, and operational challenges to maintain delivery momentum. Monitor project progress, track milestones, and provide clear status reporting to internal and external stakeholders. Drive execution excellence by ensuring alignment, accountability, and successful achievement of transformation objectives. Travel regularly to key project locations in Gothenburg and Munich to collaborate with technical and business teams. Requirements Proven experience as a Technical Project Manager with strong knowledge of SAP upgrade and transformation projects. Demonstrated experience managing large-scale global SAP projects, ideally involving SAP RISE environments. Solid understanding of SAP-related database migration projects, preferably Oracle-to-HANA migrations. Ability to follow and understand technical discussions and concepts without requiring hands-on technical consulting expertise. Strong stakeholder management and communication skills, with experience coordinating international teams. Structured and results-oriented approach with a strong focus on delivery, ownership, and execution quality. Ability to work effectively in complex, global environments with multiple stakeholders and dependencies. Fluent English language skills, both written and spoken. German language skills are considered an advantage but are not mandatory. Willingness and ability to travel regularly within Europe, particularly to Gothenburg and Munich. Benefits Opportunity to lead high-impact SAP transformation initiatives within a global enterprise environment. International collaboration with diverse technical and business teams. Exposure to complex SAP RISE projects and large-scale digital transformation programs. Flexible European location setup with accessibility to key project sites. Professional growth opportunities through involvement in strategic technology initiatives. Dynamic environment with significant ownership and responsibility. Opportunity to work on projects with strong business visibility and organizational impact. How Jobgether Works We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team. We appreciate your interest and wish you the best! Why Apply Through Jobgether? Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. title: SAP CO (Senior) Consultant (m/f/d) - Project Services
description: Company Description 👋🏼 We're Nagarro. We are a digital product engineering company that is scaling in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences that inspire, excite, and delight. We work at scale — across all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist everywhere in the world (18,000 experts across 39 countries, to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and non-hierarchical. Nagarro's global SAP business unit is a leading IT full-service provider for critical business applications and complex ERP landscapes in digital transformation. With more than 1.000 employees, we are one of the most efficient and innovative SAP partners for medium-sized companies and enterprises with an international focus. We're looking for great new colleagues. That's where you come in! ____________________________________ Als globale SAP Business Unit der Nagarro Gruppe sind wir ein führender deutscher IT-Full-Service-Provider für kritische Unternehmensapplikationen und komplexe ERP-Landschaften in der digitalen Transformation. Mit mehr als 1.000 Mitarbeiter:innen ist Nagarro in Deutschland einer der leistungsfähigsten und innovativsten SAP-Partner für den deutschen Mittelstand und Großkunden mit internationaler Ausprägung. Job Description The position is to be filled at one of our locations or remotely throughout Germany. Analyzing of the customer situation, creating process documents, concepts and blueprints with a focus on SAP controlling modules (CO-OM, CO-PA, PCA and CO-PC). Responsibility for the system-side realization of customer requirements (customizing, coordination of add-ons, user exits, development of reports, interfaces, etc.). You bring your extensive knowledge to our customer projects (introduction, expansion, upgrade, rollout, etc.). Support in all project phases from conception, design, customizing, prototyping to roll out. As a senior consultant, you can also take on partial project management in smaller teams. ____________________________________ Die Stelle ist an einem unserer Standorte oder remote in ganz Deutschland zu besetzen. Analyse der Kundensituation, Erstellung von Prozessdokumenten, Konzepten und Blueprints mit Fokus auf die SAP-Controllingmodule (CO-OM, CO-PA, PCA und CO-PC). Verantwortung für die systemseitige Umsetzung der Kundenanforderungen (Customizing, Koordination von Add-Ons, User-Exits, Entwicklung von Reports, Schnittstellen, etc.). Du bringst ein umfangreiches Wissen in unsere Kundenprojekte ein (Einführung, Erweiterung, Upgrade, Rollout, etc.). Du unterstützt in allen Projektphasen von der Konzeption, dem Design, dem Customizing, dem Prototyping bis zum Rollout. Als Senior Consultant kannst du auch die Teilprojektleitung in kleineren Teams übernehmen. Qualifications Degree in business administration / business informatics or comparable qualifications with at least 3 years of professional experience in the area of SAP CO. Good knowledge of technical and IT processes and their mapping in SAP Controlling Modul. Experience in Profitability Analysis (CO-PA), Cost Center Accounting (CO-OM-CCA), Product Costing (CO-PC), Internal Orders (CO-OM-OPA), Project-System (PS), Investment Management (IM), Reporting, Organizational Assignments) will help you to implement our requirements. Since most of our projects are in German, business fluent German is mandatory. Fluent knowledge of English is desirable for future international projects. ____________________________________ Abgeschlossenes Studium der Betriebswirtschaftslehre / Wirtschaftsinformatik oder vergleichbare Qualifikation mit mindestens 3 Jahren Berufserfahrung im Bereich SAP CO. Gute Kenntnisse der Fach- und IT-Prozesse und deren Abbildung im SAP Controlling Modul. Erfahrungen in den Bereichen Ergebnisrechnung (CO-PA), Kostenstellenrechnung (CO-OM-CCA), Produktkalkulation (CO-PC), Innenaufträge (CO-OM-OPA), Projektsystem (PS), Investitionsmanagement (IM), Berichtswesen, Organisatorische Zuordnungen) helfen dir bei der Umsetzung unserer Anforderungen. Verhandlungssichere Deutschkenntnisse und fließende Englischkenntnisse. Additional Information 30 days of paid vacation, internal and external training opportunities, MyN – Nagarro Employee Share Program, attractive company car and company bicycle arrangements, company-funded accident insurance policy, modern office space at central locations with high-tech equipment, sports programs, access to the corporate benefits portal, free fruit and drinks. Plenty of room for innovation in a high-growth environment with the latest technologies and products. With us, you can get involved and make a difference Flat hierarchies and a long-term, stable job with attractive development opportunities. ____________________________________ 30 Tage Urlaub, interne und externe Weiterbildungsmaßnahmen, MyN – Nagarro, attraktive Firmenwagen- und Jobrad-Modelle, Mitarbeiteraktienprogramm, betrieblich finanzierte Unfallversicherung, moderne Büroräume an zentralen Standorten mit High-Tech Equipment, Sportprogramme, Corporate Benefits Portal, kostenloses Obst und Getränke. Viel Raum für kreative Ideen und Innovationen in einem wachstumsstarken Umfeld. Bei uns kannst Du dich einbringen und etwas bewegen. Flache Hierarchien und einen langfristigen, stabilen Arbeitsplatz mit ansprechenden Entwicklungsmöglichkeiten Show more Show less Seniority level Not Applicable Employment type Full-time Job function Engineering Industries IT Services and IT Consulting Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Nagarro by 2x See who you know

title: SAP Consultant Compliance (m/f/d)
description: Company Description 👋🏼 We're Nagarro. We are a digital product engineering company that is scaling in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences that inspire, excite, and delight. We work at scale — across all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist everywhere in the world (18,000 experts across 38 countries, to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and non-hierarchical. Nagarro's global SAP business unit is a leading IT full-service provider for critical business applications and complex ERP landscapes in digital transformation. With more than 1.000 employees, we are one of the most efficient and innovative SAP partners for medium-sized companies and enterprises with an international focus. We're looking for great new colleagues. That's where you come in! Job Description With your in-depth expertise in the SAP authorizations environment, you are primarily involved in innovative SAP S/4HANA compliance customer projects. You will analyze customer situations, design suitable authorization concepts, and implement them in compliance with the Segregation of Duties (SoD). You optimize future processes for SAP user and authorization management, the associated organizations and the underlying systems. You support all relevant project phases - conception, design, customizing, roll out as well as 2nd and 3rd-level support. In addition, if you are interested, you can take over (partial) project management in various customer projects as well as support in presales activities. Qualifications You have several years of professional experience in the SAP authorizations environment and have already gained diverse experience with S/4HANA. You have actively participated in greenfield and brownfield implementations. You have experience in the independent design of SAP authorization concepts as well as their implementation and rollout. Knowledge in SAP Compliance / Separation of Functions (SoD) / SAP GRC (SAP GRC Access Control) is desirable. You are business fluent in German and fluent in English. Additional Information 30 days of paid vacation, internal and external training opportunities, MyN – Nagarro Employee Share Program, attractive company car and company bicycle arrangements, company-funded accident insurance policy, modern office space at central locations with high-tech equipment, sports programs, access to the corporate benefits portal, free fruit and drinks. Plenty of room for innovation in a high-growth environment with the latest technologies and products. With us, you can get involved and make a difference. Flat hierarchies and a long-term, stable job with attractive development opportunities. title: SAP Retail Consultant
description: SAP (Senior) Consultant Retail / SD/MM (m/w/d) | Remote deutschlandweit Ein etabliertes Beratungshaus mit Start-up-Mentalität sucht Verstärkung für sein wachsendes SAP-Team. Seit über 25 Jahren begleitet das Unternehmen mittelständische Handels- und Großhandelsunternehmen bei komplexen SAP-Transformationen – von internationalen S/4HANA-Transformationen bis hin zu Greenfield-Implementierungen. Mit Fokus auf Retail, Wholesale und angrenzende Industrien betreut das Unternehmen namhafte Kunden ganzheitlich entlang der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette – von Stammdaten und Beschaffung über Supply Chain und Omnichannel-Prozesse bis hin zur Kassenintegration. Das Unternehmen wächst stark, verfügt über eine ausgezeichnete Projektlage und möchte seine Delivery-Kapazitäten in den kommenden Jahren deutlich ausbauen. Deine Aufgaben Verantwortung in anspruchsvollen SAP-Projekten mit Schwerpunkt SAP Retail bzw. SAP SD/MM Mitarbeit in S/4HANA-Transformationsprojekten (ECC → S/4) Unterstützung bei Greenfield-Implementierungen und internationalen Rollouts Analyse, Konzeption, Customizing und Integration von SAP-Lösungen Beratung von Kunden aus dem Mittelstand im Handelsumfeld Integration angrenzender Lösungen und moderner Industry-/Cloud-Technologien Durchführung von Workshops, Schulungen und Kundenpräsentationen Enge Zusammenarbeit mit erfahrenen Experten-Teams Das bringst du mit: Erfahrung in SAP Retail oder in SAP SD/MM bzw. FI Kenntnisse im Handelsumfeld sind von Vorteil, aber kein Muss. Erfahrung in SAP-Projekten, idealerweise mit S/4HANA-Bezug Interesse an ganzheitlichen End-to-End-Prozessen Kundenorientierte und lösungsorientierte Arbeitsweise Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse sowie gutes Englisch Reisebereitschaft von ca. 20–30 % Auch Kandidat/-innen mit erster Berufserfahrung oder kleinere bestehende Teams sind ausdrücklich willkommen. Das erwartet dich: Spannende Transformations- und Innovationsprojekte Sehr hohe Remote-Flexibilität innerhalb Deutschlands Familiäre Unternehmenskultur mit flachen Hierarchien Moderne Arbeitsweise mit viel Eigenverantwortung Firmenwagenoption, BahnCard und Bike-Leasing Individuelle Weiterbildungs- und Zertifizierungsmöglichkeiten Regelmäßige Team-Events und Workshops Langfristige Perspektive in einem stark wachsenden Umfeld Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht oder die Zusendung deines Profils. title: IT-Consultants Graduates (f/d/m)
description: Description Welcome future financial experts! At SAP Fioneer we believe in building the future of financial services. Join us on a transformative journey as a part of our Graduate Program L.I.F.T = Level up in Fioneer Technology! Our affiliate okadis works very closely with us and supports us in the search and onboarding of young talents. Our okadis colleagues take over the selection process and also the onboarding for the IT-Consultant role, within our Graduate Program, to provide you a perfect start. You will embark on a journey to kickstart your career within a global software company with a start-up mentality. Here, you'll be tackling real tasks and contributing to impactful projects from day one. Immersing yourself in a dynamic environment, whether it's engaging with clients or diving into product development. We believe in your potential, providing time for learning and growth, ensuring that you become fully productive as soon as possible. This is an extremely unique advantage of being part of the SAP Family with the advantages of a start-up like fast growing organization: the freedom to create and entrepreneurial ways of working in a talent-centric organization with great career opportunities arising. This is your chance to work with passionate professionals and the best experts in the industry - have an impact, create true value. So what are you waiting for? Check out what it takes to become part of our L.I.F.T Program! What Will I Be Doing From the first day you will be in a real life client environment helping companies in the financial services industry to achieve speed, scalability, and cost efficiency through digital business innovation, cloud technology, and solutions that cover banking and insurance processes end to end. Our Promise to YOU You get enough time for learning, so you will be fully productive and creating value after three months. A unique opportunity: we combine all advantages of being a) a part of the SAP family (leading enterprise grade platform, well-known brand, sales & service with global reach and many more) with b) the advantages of a startup-like fast growing organization: the freedom to create and entrepreneurial ways of working in a talent-centric organization with great career opportunities arising. Requirements Degree Courses: Bachelor's/Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Informatics, Physics, Mathematics or another subject in Natural Sciences Hard Skills Strong analytical skills and quantitative thinking Structure & stringent logic Clear communication: ability to convince and influence Ideally you have experience in at least one programming language such as Python, Java, C++ or ABAP and/or practical experience with database systems, data modeling and data queries using SQL You Are a Person Who Is searching for success Has an ambition to solve problems and create solutions Has an entrepreneurial mindset Work Experience Initial experience in the consulting business or with financial service providers is advantageous! Benefits Diverse career paths in Development, Consulting, Co-Innovation, and Sales No rigid paths here – we believe in growing together Embrace our ethos: Own it, become it Find work-life balance with both on-site and remote options Drive direct impact and create true value Enjoy competitive compensation, a fast-paced learning path, and mentorship Show more Show less Seniority level Not Applicable Employment type Full-time Job function Information Technology Industries Information Technology & Services Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at SAP Fioneer by 2x See who you know
