title: HQ Full time standard template - SKIMS
description: Department: Multibrand/Hybrid/Franchise Location: Los Angeles HQ Compensation: $100,000 - $110,000 / year Description SKIMS is a solutions-oriented brand creating the next generation of underwear, loungewear, shapewear, and essentials. We are setting new standards by delivering technically innovative, comfort-driven products with elevated design for everybody. At the intersection of culture, innovation, and commerce, SKIMS is a global brand redefining modern apparel. Our teams are built on creativity, collaboration, and operational excellence, and we are committed to fostering an inclusive, high-performance environment where ambitious, curious, and values-driven individuals can do the best work of their careers. As we continue to scale globally, our HQ teams play a critical role in shaping strategy, building world-class infrastructure, and driving sustainable growth across markets. The Franchise Planner is responsible for driving inventory productivity, sales performance, and commercial planning across SKIMS' global franchise partners. This role partners closely with Franchise Sales, Merchandising, Product, Supply Chain, and external franchise partners to ensure the right products are available in the right markets at the right time. The ideal candidate is highly analytical, commercially minded, and thrives in a fast-paced, high-growth environment. They are comfortable working across multiple international markets, balancing strategic planning with hands-on execution, and using data to identify opportunities that drive growth. Key Responsibilities Develop seasonal and annual merchandise financial plans for global franchise partners. Build demand forecasts by market, partner, product category, and channel. Analyze sales, inventory, weeks of supply, sell-through, and margin performance to maximize profitability. Partner with Franchise Sales and Merchandising teams to create pre-season assortment and inventory strategies. Monitor in-season business performance, identifying risks and opportunities, and recommend actions to optimize results. Collaborate with Supply Chain and Logistics teams to ensure timely inventory flow and allocation across franchise markets. Manage inventory investments to achieve sales, margin, and inventory productivity targets. Support seasonal buys, replenishment strategies, and exit plans for seasonal inventory. Prepare weekly, monthly, and quarterly business reviews for internal leadership and franchise partners. Develop reporting and dashboards to provide visibility into KPIs and market performance. Partner with Finance on forecasting, budgeting, and inventory planning. Provide commercial recommendations using consumer insights, market trends, and historical performance. Work cross-functionally with Product Development, Planning, Merchandising, Operations, and Regional teams to support global growth initiatives. Continuously improve planning tools, reporting, and forecasting processes. Skills, Knowledge and Expertise Bachelor's degree in Business, Finance, Merchandising, Supply Chain, or a related field. 3–6+ years of merchandise planning, inventory planning, or allocation experience within retail, wholesale, or franchise businesses. Experience planning international or franchise businesses preferred. Strong financial and analytical skills with the ability to interpret large data sets. Advanced Microsoft Excel skills (pivot tables, lookups, financial modeling). Experience with planning systems such as Anaplan, SAP, Oracle, NetSuite, or similar ERP/planning platforms preferred. Strong understanding of inventory management, forecasting, assortment planning, and replenishment. Excellent communication and presentation skills with the ability to influence cross-functional stakeholders. Highly organized with exceptional attention to detail. Ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment. Preferred Experience Experience supporting international wholesale or franchise partners. Knowledge of global retail calendars and regional trading patterns. Experience working with multiple currencies and international inventory planning. Understanding of apparel retail planning, including size and color optimization. Familiarity with BI and reporting tools such as Tableau, Power BI, or Looker. What You'll Bring A commercial mindset with strong financial acumen. Curiosity to challenge assumptions and identify new opportunities. Exceptional analytical and problem-solving skills. A collaborative approach with the ability to build strong relationships across global teams. A proactive, hands-on attitude with a willingness to roll up your sleeves. The ability to thrive in ambiguity and adapt quickly as the business evolves. A passion for product, retail, and delivering an exceptional customer experience. At SKIMS, we move quickly, think boldly, and continually raise the standard. If you're passionate about using data to shape global growth and want to help build one of the world's fastest-growing consumer brands, we'd love to hear from you. Benefits, Culture and Perks Benefits and Culture Up to 100% Company Paid Healthcare (medical, dental, vision) Kind Body Fertility Benefits 401(k) savings plan with up to 4% match Unlimited PTO Full Access to LinkedIn learning Employee Discounts Perks (HQ Location) Free weekly catered lunch at HQ – M/T/W/Th Dog-Friendly office on a Thursday and Friday Free Swag Giveaways Annual Holiday Party Annual Summer Party Invitations to pop-ups and other company events Complimentary daily office snacks and beverages Show more Show less Seniority level Mid-Senior level Employment type Full-time Job function Other Industries Retail Apparel and Fashion Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at SKIMS by 2x See who you know

title: SAP Technology Architect (all genders)
description: Aufgaben Die SAP-Beratung liegt in der DNA von MHP. Wir bieten Raum für moderne Digitalisierungslösungen und entwickeln unser SAP-Portfolio ständig weiter - insbesondere im Bereich S/4 HANA. Als SAP - Technology Architect profitierst du von dieser Vielfalt und hast die Chance die SAP Transformation unserer Kunden aktiv mitzugestalten. Dabei warten die folgenden Aufgaben auf dich: Beratung unserer Kunden zu on-premise, cloud bzw. hybriden- SAP Architekturen sowie modernen Landschaften Auswahl passender Technologien (z.B. ABAP, RAP, CAP), Definition der Softwarearchitektur und Aufsetzen von Best Practices in diesem Kontext Übernahme einer Führungsrolle in Bezug auf innovative Technologie und Software insbesondere mit Fokus auf S/4HANA oder BTP Sicherstellung der Qualitätsanforderungen von RICEFW-Entwicklungen, beispielsweise im Rahmen unserer S/4 Transformationsprojekte Anforderungen Um für deinen Weg als SAP - Technology Architect gewappnet zu sein, hast du folgende Qualifikationen im Gepäck: Abgeschlossenes Studium in einem IT-nahen Studiengang und mind. 3 Jahre Berufserfahrung Leidenschaft für Technologietrends im SAP-Bereich Expertise in SAP-Architektur und Erfahrungen mit aktuellen SAP-Technologien im Entwicklungsumfeld Deine Arbeitsweise zeichnet sich durch kreative, analytische Problemlösungsfähigkeiten aus und ist geprägt durch dein souveränes Auftreten als Trusted Advisor nach intern und extern Wissenswertes vor der Abfahrt: Beginn: nach Vereinbarung – immer zu Beginn eines Monats Arbeitszeit: in Vollzeit (40h); 30 Urlaubstage Arbeitsverhältnis: Unbefristet Arbeitsbereich: Consulting Sprache: sicheres Deutsch & Englisch Flexibilität & Reisebereitschaft Sonstiges: eine gültige Arbeitserlaubnis; bei Bedarf können wir die Arbeitserlaubnis im Rahmen unseres Recruiting-Prozesses beantragen. Das Verfahren benötigt Zeit und hat Einfluss auf das Startdatum. title: Auxiliar de Inducción y Seguimiento de Personal en Planta – Lurín
description: En Inversiones San Gabriel S.A., Una De Las Principales Empresas Peruanas Dedicadas a La Fabricación De Empaques Para Alimentos, Con Más De 35 Años De Experiencia En El Mercado, Nos Encontramos En La Búsqueda De Auxiliar de Inducción y Seguimiento de Personal en Planta – Lurín 📍 Lugar de trabajo: Lurín 🕒 Horario: Lunes a viernes de 7:00 a. m. a 4:33 p. m. y sábados de 7:00 a. m. a 11:00 a. m. 💰 Remuneración: A negociar Requisitos ✅ Técnico o universitario en Administración, Ingeniería Industrial, Recursos Humanos, Contabilidad o carreras afines. ✅ Experiencia mínima de 6 meses a 1 año en funciones administrativas o de Recursos Humanos. ✅ Manejo de Excel intermedio indispensable. ✅ Conocimientos básicos de Power BI deseable. ✅ Disponibilidad para laborar de manera presencial en Lurín. Funciones Principales Realizar seguimiento en planta al programa de inducción específica para el personal nuevo. Verificar que las inducciones se desarrollen conforme a los procedimientos establecidos. Entrevistar al personal nuevo para obtener feedback sobre su proceso de inducción y adaptación. Registrar observaciones, incidencias y oportunidades de mejora. Hacer seguimiento a la asistencia y permanencia del personal nuevo. Mantener actualizados los registros de motivos de falta y reportes de inducción/capacitación. Elaborar reportes de seguimiento al Plan de Capacitación. Aplicar encuestas de salida al personal cesado. Realizar reportes de análisis de rotación y retención de personal. Actualizar bases de datos y elaborar reportes en Excel. Brindar soporte administrativo al área de Recursos Humanos. Ofrecemos ✅ Ingreso a planilla desde el primer día. ✅ Todos los beneficios de ley. ✅ Oportunidad de aprendizaje y desarrollo en el área de Recursos Humanos. title: Administrateur SAP Basis (H/F)
description: Description de l'entreprise Talan est un groupe international de conseil et d’expertise technologique en forte croissance, présent sur plusieurs continents. Nous accompagnons les entreprises dans leurs transformations stratégiques et digitales en combinant expertise métier, intégration de solutions et innovation technologique. Nous travaillons avec les plus grands éditeurs du marché : SAP, Oracle, Microsoft, Salesforce, IBM, ServiceNow. Notre ambition : aider les entreprises à moderniser leurs systèmes, intégrer l’IA et créer de la valeur durable. Description du poste ✨ Un rôle clé au cœur des environnements SAP Vous assurez le bon fonctionnement des systèmes SAP utilisés au quotidien par des milliers d’utilisateurs. Votre mission : garantir disponibilité, performance et évolutivité des plateformes. Un poste technique, concret, essentiel. Là où la stabilité des systèmes fait toute la différence. Vos missions Administrer les environnements SAP Basis (ECC, BW, Solution Manager, PO…) Assurer la disponibilité et la performance des systèmes SAP Gérer les incidents techniques et garantir leur résolution Réaliser les opérations de maintenance et de supervision Participer aux projets techniques : upgrades, migrations, installations Effectuer les copies systèmes, refresh et transports Administrer les bases de données et systèmes associés Appliquer les bonnes pratiques d’exploitation SAP Qualifications Votre profil Première expérience en administration SAP Basis (2 ans minimum) Bonne maîtrise des environnements SAP (ECC, BW, SolMan…) Connaissances en bases de données : SAP HANA, Oracle Database ou Microsoft SQL Server Connaissances systèmes : Windows Server, Linux ou Unix Expérience sur installations, upgrades ou copies systèmes SAP Notions de scripting appréciées Anglais technique Rigueur, sens du service et esprit d’équipe Informations supplémentaires Ce que vous y gagnez Des environnements SAP complexes et stimulants Une vraie montée en expertise sur le périmètre SAP Basis Des projets variés : run, build et transformation Un environnement expert chez PASàPAS, a Talan Company, groupe Talan Télétravail flexible jusqu’à 5 jours selon missions + prime d’équipement Formation continue + mentoring + mobilité en France et à l’international Un cadre reconnu (Great Place to Work, culture d’entraide forte) Avantages complets : transport, mutuelle, tickets resto, primes Pourquoi nous rejoindre ? Vous êtes au cœur du système. Sans vous, rien ne tourne. Vous intervenez sur des infrastructures critiques et contribuez directement à la continuité des activités métiers. Ici, votre expertise technique a un impact immédiat et visible. Envie de relever le défi ? Si vous aimez les environnements SAP techniques, exigeants et structurés, ce poste d’Administrateur SAP Basis est fait pour vous Show more Show less Seniority level Not Applicable Employment type Full-time Job function Information Technology Industries IT Services and IT Consulting Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Talan by 2x See who you know

title: SAP Consultant Manufacturing
description: Als SAP Business Consultant Manufacturing binnen myBrand Conclusion ben jij de vertrouwde adviseur die klanten inspireert en begeleidt bij het vinden van de beste oplossingen in SAP op het gebied van Manufacturing. Je geeft richting aan digitale transformaties bij toonaangevende organisaties. Je vertaalt strategische doelstellingen naar slimme SAP-oplossingen en begeleidt klanten bij hun transitie naar S/4HANA – van Public Cloud tot internationale greenfield-implementaties. In deze rol ben je de verbindende schakel tussen de productiepraktijk van de klant en de mogelijkheden die SAP biedt. Je kent de processen rondom productplanning, productiebeheer en manufacturing execution door en door, en weet precies hoe je deze vertaalt naar een toekomstbestendige SAP-inrichting. Je werkt bij diverse klanten in heel Nederland, waarbij geen dag hetzelfde is. Van het begeleiden van fit-to-standard workshops en het opstellen van blueprints tot het presenteren van oplossingen aan het management van de klant – jij bent degene die het verschil maakt. Heb je ervaring met SAP PP, Manufacturing Execution of verwante modules binnen S/4HANA of klassiek SAP ERP? Dan ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres. Je vakgebied is volop in beweging en onze klanten zijn heel divers, waardoor deze rol volop mogelijkheden biedt voor persoonlijke groei en ontwikkeling. Je krijgt de kans om je verder te specialiseren en mee te denken over complexe manufacturing vraagstukken in uiteenlopende branches. Samen met jouw functionele collega's ga jij binnen jouw klantteam of project altijd op zoek naar het creëren van een ultiem tevreden opdrachtgever. Ontmoet jouw collega's Je kiest niet alleen voor een leuke baan, maar ook voor leuke collega's! Het SAP Implementation Services team bestaat uit 30+ SAP Business Consultants die in hun ontwikkeling worden begeleid door de unitdirecteur en twee teamleiders. Je werkt in deze rol nauw samen met sales, relatiemanagers, projectmanagers en verschillende projectteams. Deze projectteams variëren in grootte tussen de 5 en 20 interne collega's – en daarnaast natuurlijk het team van de klant. Je werkt dus nauw samen met SAP-specialisten van allerlei verschillende achtergronden, disciplines en vaardigheden in zowel kort- als langlopende projecten. Klik op de onderstaande buttons om Frank, Yolanda en Duran alvast te leren kennen. Hier herken jij jezelf in Voor deze functie heb je kennis nodig van SAP Manufacturing-processen en moet je zelfstandig klanten kunnen begeleiden, maar eigenlijk zijn we vooral ook op zoek naar iemand die als mens bij ons past! Jij herkent jezelf in de onderstaande aspecten die volgens ons daarbij van belang zijn: Je hebt ervaring met SAP PP of aanverwante Manufacturing-modules, bij voorkeur binnen S/4HANA of in een transitietraject hiernaartoe. Gezien de complexiteit van de vraagstukken kun je op HBO/WO-niveau werken, zowel in gesprekken als op papier. Je kunt complexe SAP-oplossingen op een overtuigende, eenvoudige en aansprekende manier communiceren en presenteren aan zowel business als IT. Je weet hoe belangrijk het is om goed te documenteren en neemt daar ook de verantwoordelijkheid voor. Je voelt je verantwoordelijk voor je project en zet een stap extra voor je collega's of de klant wanneer de situatie hierom vraagt. We hebben je veel te bieden Je start binnen de unit SAP Implementation Services en werkt vanuit één van onze vestigingen in Maarssen, Geertruidenberg of Apeldoorn. Vanuit deze locaties ondersteunen we onze klanten lokaal. Je werkt afwisselend op kantoor, bij de klant op locatie of gewoon vanuit huis – wat het beste past bij jou en het project. Wij vinden een goede sfeer enorm belangrijk. In onze vestigingen lunchen we dan ook graag samen aan lange tafels. Elk kwartaal komen we na het werk met alle collega's bij elkaar om bij te praten, maar vooral ook om een gezellige avond te hebben met een hapje en een drankje. Jaarlijks organiseren we een familiedag, fanatiek (en minder fanatiek) sportende collega's vinden elkaar om samen te sporten – en als jij iets wilt organiseren voor en met collega's, dan is daar altijd ruimte voor. title: Senior SAP Platform Architect (m/w/d)
description: ENERCON gehört seit 40 Jahren zu den Technologieführern im Bereich der Windenergie. Als erster Hersteller von Windenergieanlagen setzte das Unternehmen ein getriebeloses Antriebskonzept ein, das ein Merkmal aller ENERCON Windenergieanlagen ist. Auch in anderen Bereichen, wie z.B. Rotorblattdesign, Steuerungstechnik und Netzanschlusstechnik ist ENERCON führend und beweist mit einer Vielzahl von technologischen Neuentwicklungen immer wieder seine Innovationskraft. Senior SAP Platform Architect (m/w/d) Innovative Ideen sind das Markenzeichen unserer Erfolge und treiben uns an. Wir setzen uns mit Leidenschaft dafür ein, Windenergieprojekte weltweit zu realisieren und die energietechnischen Herausforderungen von morgen zu meistern. Du kannst mit deinem Engagement dazu beitragen, die Zukunft der erneuerbaren Energien zu gestalten. Die Position ist mit einer Gehaltsspanne von 74.400 € bis 81.200 € brutto jährlich ausgestattet – abhängig von Qualifikation und relevanter Berufserfahrung. Darüber hinaus profitierst Du von zusätzlichen Sonderzahlungen in Form von Urlaubs- und Weihnachtsgeld, gemäß Betriebszugehörigkeit, die sich gestaffelt entwickeln: nach sechs Monaten 20%, nach neun Monaten 30%, nach zwanzig Monaten 40%, nach zweiunddreißig Monaten 50% des Monatsgehalts. title: Lead - Finance & Accounts
description: Job Description – Lead-Finance And Accounts Enriching Lives Winning as ONE ABC Company Info Aditya Birla Capital Limited ("ABCL") is the holding company for the financial services businesses of the Aditya Birla Group. With subsidiaries/JVs that have a strong presence across Protecting, Investing and Financing solutions, ABCL is a financial solutions group that caters to the diverse needs of its customers across their life cycle. Powered by more than 38,000 employees, the businesses of ABCL have a nationwide reach with over 1300 branches, more than 2,00,000 agents/channel partners and various bank partners. Aditya Birla Finance Limited Aditya Birla Finance Limited (“ABFL”), a subsidiary of Aditya Birla Capital Limited, is among the leading well-diversified non-banking financial services company in India. ABFL offers customized solutions in the areas of personal finance, mortgage finance, SME finance, corporate finance, wealth management, debt capital markets and loan syndication. What makes an ideal ABC Citizen? At ABC, we are constantly on the lookout for individuals who resonate with our 5 core values of Speed, Passion, Integrity, Seamlessness and commitment and live them every day, while also understanding our vision. We believe in building leaders who thrive on challenges, take the onus of creating and sustaining strong teams, and forms strong networks as a result of effective relationship-building. Role Details Business Aditya Birla Capital Unit Aditya Birla Capital Limited Location Mumbai Role Lead-Finance and Accounts Department Finance and Accounts Eligibility Criteria Bachelor or master’s degree, Experience in Collection for mid market/corporate Required Skills & Competencies Analytical thinking and attention to detail. Integrity and strong ethical standards. Effective communication and reporting. Process orientation and innovative mindset. Networking and stakeholder management. Ability to understand complexity of deal Flexibility for travel and on-ground for collection. Technical proficiency in MIS and fraud systems. Key Responsibilities Job Purpose To assist closure of monthly financials as per INDAS requirements, follow up with internal as well as external teams for provisioning as well as reconciliation of all accounts and other statutory dues workings, execute. Also to assist in preparation of accurate quarterly returns to RBI and providing data during RBI onsite inspection including Indents and resolving RBI queries. The Team Member Financials & Regulatory Reporting is responsible for preparation of financials as per IND AS at monthly intervals. Also the team member is responsible to liaise with various Income and Expense team member for calculation and presentation of IND AS related changes in the financials. Also the team member is responsible to liaise with Tax team for presentation of correct Computation of Income Tax and Deferred Tax and presentation of the same in the financials. Apart from the this the team member is also responsible for accurate filing of RBI Return at quarterly Intervals. There are 3 different huge RBI Returns to be filed at quarterly intervals. Since the same is regulatory filing to the Regulator, so accuracy of the data is of utmost importance for which team member has to liaise with multiple department across the organisation. Due to ever changing requirements of business and addition of new product lines, the person should be able to do UAT and help in system implementation, process development and should have collaborative approach. Refer the links to know more Growth & Culture at ABC: https://www.adityabirlacapital.com/careers?ref=abc-homepage Stay updated with Life at ABC - Follow our LinkedIn Page: https://www.linkedin.com/company/aditya-birla-capital Browse our Glassdoor Reviews: https://shorturl.at/fJKQ0 Disclaimer Aditya Birla Capital is committed to provide equal opportunity to all in employment and prohibits discrimination or harassment in any form on the basis of race, colour, religion, ethnicity, age, gender, disability or any other characteristic protected by law. Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) is embedded in our recruitment policies based on our business needs and candidates meeting the eligibility criteria such as qualification, skills and experience. Important Aditya Birla Capital and its member companies do not demand or accept money from job applicants. Any job offer made against a service charge or security deposit or processing fees or background verification expenses or any other terms, whether refundable or non-refundable should be considered fake. An authentic job offer mail from us will have our domain name (adityabirlacapital.com). Please be aware of fraudsters using fake URLs to mask themselves as senders from reputed organisations. Hence always check and verify the email ID. Any mail offering a job, interview date and asking for personal details should be handled with caution, especially if the mail address list also includes email IDs ending with Gmail/Yahoo/Hotmail/Live domains. In case a job applicant is offered a job against payment in any form, or has accepted employment from fraudulent persons, Aditya Birla Capital and its member companies will NOT be held liable and responsible for any consequences thereof. Please remain vigilant of such offers and notify us here .You may also lodge a complaint with the law enforcement agencies. Beware of fake websites, email IDs, Facebook, LinkedIn pages that appear similar to ours. We reserve the right to initiate any appropriate action as we deem fit. title: Team Member - Audit
description: Position Title: Business Internal Audit - Team Member Qualification: Chartered Accountant Work Experience: 4 to 6 years Location: Prabhadevi, Mumbai Purpose The Business Internal Audit – Team member is responsible for Independently executing High Quality Internal Audit of the business & Enterprise Functions providing independent, objective assurance to the Senior Management, and the Audit Committee through the Business Audit Team Lead, on the effectiveness of internal controls, governance and risk management frameworks. Desired Profile Strong understanding of business process, risk, controls and governance Experience with ERP systems (SAP/Oracle) and data analytics Strong analytical, communication and stakeholder management skills High integrity, independence and professional judgment Ability to independently drive audits end-to-end Strong problem-solving and risk identification skills Effective communication with senior management Proactive, learning-oriented mindset with focus on value creation. Key Responsibilities Audit Execution Plan and execute audits independently as per approved audit plan. Perform walkthroughs, process mapping, and control testing (design & operating effectiveness). Prepare workpapers, RCMs, and audit documentation in line with standards. Conduct field visits (plants/sites) and complete audits within timelines. Risk & Control Assessment Evaluate governance, risk management, and internal controls across: Financial Operational Compliance Technology processes Identify control gaps, red flags, and inefficiencies. Perform root-cause analysis and assess risk exposure. Reporting & Recommendations Draft audit observations, risk ratings, and reports. Provide practical, value-driven recommendations with clear ownership and timelines. Support preparation of management presentations and Audit Committee updates. Follow-up & Closure Track audit actions and validate closure of findings. Ensure timely implementation of recommendations. Escalate delays or recurring issues appropriately. Value Creation Identify opportunities for: Cost savings Process improvements Automation and standardization Quantify financial impact (loss prevention, revenue improvement). Stakeholder Management Engage with process owners and leadership to ensure smooth audit execution. Influence stakeholders for timely resolution of issues. Act as a trusted advisor on risk and control matters. Data Analytics & Technology Use data analytics and automation in audits. Support adoption of digital tools and continuous monitoring. Provide assurance on IT, digital, and cyber risks. Special Assignments Support fraud investigations, control breakdown analysis, and special reviews. Coordinate with external internal auditors where required. title: AI Technical Architect — SAP & Core Business Processes (Remote)
description: Arxada is a global leader in innovative solutions that protect our world. Our groundbreaking technologies, in-depth regulatory know-how, manufacturing and process development help our customers to safeguard nutrition, health and infrastructure efficiently through chemistry and biotechnology that enhance sustainability. We offer a broad portfolio of ingredients and services for multiple end markets that include Human Health & Nutrition, Home & Personal Care, Professional Hygiene, Paints & Coatings and Wood Protection. With customers in more than 100 countries, the company achieved sales of CHF 2 billion in 2024. Headquartered in Basel (Switzerland), Arxada employs 3,200 associates across 24 production sites and 14 R&D centers, all committed to our customers’ success. As an AI Technical Architect — SAP & Core Business Processes you will drive the design, build, and industrialization of AI capabilities across Arxada’s SAP landscape. Acting as a hands-on technical leader, you will bring AI into core business processes—embedding intelligence directly into finance, supply chain, procurement, and manufacturing operations. You will own architecture and delivery of process‑embedded AI solutions, ensuring they are scalable, compliant, and aligned with a clean‑core S/4HANA strategy. Partnering closely with business and technology stakeholders, you will translate complex requirements into production‑ready solutions while mentoring a small team as a player‑coach. This is a unique opportunity to shape the future of AI within a global organization, combining innovation with real operational impact. Key Responsibilities Design, build, and deploy AI use cases across the SAP estate using SAP BTP, AI Core, Joule, and Datasphere Own end‑to‑end architecture for process‑embedded AI across finance, treasury, supply chain, procurement, sales, and warehouse operations Ensure clean‑core principles by developing side‑by‑side extensions on SAP BTP, protecting the S/4HANA roadmap Integrate master data (PLM/MDM) as a trusted foundation for AI use cases and data-driven decision making Connect plant and MES signals into ERP processes, enabling end‑to‑end operational visibility and analytics Embed compliant and auditable AI solutions within regulated environments (e.g. GAMP 5, 21 CFR Part 11, EU Annex 11) Lead and mentor a small team of engineers and functional experts, driving delivery and technical excellence Manage AI lifecycle, MLOps practices, and technical debt to ensure scalable, maintainable, and cost-efficient solutions Qualifications & Experience 8+ years of experience in SAP architecture/engineering with a strong hands‑on delivery track record Deep expertise in SAP technologies including BTP, AI Core, Datasphere, and Business AI / Joule Strong understanding of core business processes across finance, supply chain, procurement, and sales Proven experience with SAP integration and extensibility (Integration Suite/CPI, side‑by‑side architecture) Solid coding and MLOps capabilities, with experience designing AI solutions in regulated environments Experience leading engineering or cross-functional teams as a hands-on “player‑coach” Strong ownership mindset with the ability to drive initiatives end‑to‑end Experience with S/4HANA transformation and migration programs Exposure to GxP or other regulated environments and SAP MDM/PLM Experience integrating MES and ERP systems in manufacturing environments Fluency in English; Spanish is an advantage Arxada has world class offering in two distinct areas: Microbial Control Solutions (MCS) focuses on threats posed by microorganisms to people and planet through five distinct business lines including Professional Hygiene, Home & Personal Care, Wood Protection, Paints & Coatings and Material Protection. Nutrition, Care & Environmental (NCE), meanwhile, provides materials used to manufacture composites for electronics, aerospace and other markets, as well as vitamins and nutritional ingredients, chemicals and performance intermediates, and raw materials for a wide range of high-performance applications. Arxada is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, age, status as a qualified individual with disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. title: SAP Product Manager MRO (f/m/d)
description: Job Description: Take off with Airbus Helicopters! In the ERP PSL team of Airbus Helicopters we are looking for a SAP Product Manager MRO (f/m/d) in Marignane. The successful applicant will join the "ERP PSL" team. You will be part of a team developing, building and maintaining all ERP applications of Airbus Helicopters. As part of the ERP PSL team, you will be involved in all functional and technical activities aiming at an end-to-end business process implementation view. Join us to shape the future of aeronautics and help protect lives during missions accomplished thanks to our helicopters. The Marignane site, the 3rd largest industrial site in France, near Marseille and Aix-en-Provence, is undergoing a deep transformation to offer a high-tech, inclusive, and environmentally friendly working environment. You will live a unique professional experience, at the heart of the manufacturing of our helicopters. To learn more about our site and our activities: Airbus Helicopters - Marignane Your future missions : Developing a solid understanding on Airbus Helicopter business processes in the domain of MRO (maintenance, repair and overhaul) ideally the end-to-end process. Understanding the key drivers and measures of success for the business, and the short- and long-term direction of the business and related ERP technologies (SAP ECC6, SAP S/4 Hana and SAP Fiori). Analyzing and understanding business requirements on MRO and translating the business needs into IT requirements and solutions. Accountable for the end to end product lifecycle, from conception, design, industrialization, operation and retirement. Ensure the IT solution delivery according to the requirements specified and validated (make or buy). Managing the IT activities as listed above mainly while implementing MRO functionality into SAP ECC6, SAP S/4 Hana and SAP Fiori. Ensuring participation being involved in the Airbus Helicopters newERP transformation program for MRO management. Your profile: Degree in information technologies, information management or similar. Several years of experience with SAP modules like CS, PM, PS on SAP ECC6, SAP S/4 Hana and SAP Fiori for MRO related functionalities. Experienced in activity management and follow-up (preferably with an understanding of agile methodologies) Fluent in English (reading, writing and speaking) is mandatory. Advanced level in the French language would be helpful. We are looking for a candidate who is autonomous, flexible, curious with good communication skills, entrepreneurial and customer oriented with a deep and wide knowledge on SAP implementations. The candidate shall be in all cases a team player, team oriented and service minded. This position requires a security clearance or will require being eligible for clearance by the recognized authorities. What We Offer: A challenging and rewarding position with the opportunity to make a significant impact within the AI innovation landscape. The chance to work on a diverse portfolio of cutting-edge AI projects. A dynamic and collaborative work environment. Join us and shape the future of AI innovation! 3 Reasons to join us: Our Values : Six essential values form the core of our company. Defined for employees by employees, our Airbus values shape the DNA of our business, reflecting the unique mix of qualities found in each member of our global family. Inclusion and diversity : We foster an inclusive and rewarding work environment, where everyone's diversity is valued and respected. An inclusive and diverse workforce is the engine of innovation at Airbus. It makes us unique and contributes to better problem-solving. Compensation and benefits : At Airbus, we build the future together and your success is our priority. Expect a global, competitive, and transparent compensation package (including salaries, bonuses, profit-sharing, participation, and preferred share ownership plan), designed to reward the impact and performance you bring, both individually and collectively. We invest in your complete well-being: professional development (training, mentoring, international mobility), health coverage, retirement, and a commitment to a supported work-life balance (parental support, flexibility). And for your daily life, benefits that make a difference: A dynamic CSE (Social and Economic Committee) offering many advantages (company restaurant, children's leisure center, associations and sports complex, travel allowances, etc.). Transport facilities: Take advantage of our company shuttles or the reimbursement of your annual transport pass. Our recruitment process: Apply online. Analysis of your application by the recruitment department. Our positions require a security clearance, complete the questionnaire that will be sent to you. Conduct recruitment interviews: HR interview and technical interview with your future manager Receive the job offer! Ready to take off? Give a new dimension to your career by applying online now! This job requires an awareness of any potential compliance risks and a commitment to act with integrity, as the foundation for the Company’s success, reputation and sustainable growth. Company: Airbus Helicopters SAS Employment Type: Permanent Classe Emploi (France): Classe G14 Experience Level: Professional Job Family: Digital By submitting your CV or application you are consenting to Airbus using and storing information about you for monitoring purposes relating to your application or future employment. This information will only be used by Airbus. Airbus is committed to achieving workforce diversity and creating an inclusive working environment. We welcome all applications irrespective of social and cultural background, age, gender, disability, sexual orientation or religious belief. Airbus is, and always has been, committed to equal opportunities for all. As such, we will never ask for any type of monetary exchange in the frame of a recruitment process. Any impersonation of Airbus to do so should be reported to emsom@airbus.com . At Airbus, we support you to work, connect and collaborate more easily and flexibly. Wherever possible, we foster flexible working arrangements to stimulate innovative thinking. #YESPOST Show more Show less Seniority level Not Applicable Employment type Full-time Job function Product Management and Marketing Industries Aviation and Aerospace Component Manufacturing Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Airbus Helicopters by 2x See who you know

title: CHARGE AMELIORATION CONTINUE F/H
description: Leader depuis plus de 80 ans sur ses marchés avec un chiffre d’affaires de 600 Millions d’Euros, la société Panzani a su conserver une organisation à taille humaine avec près de 850 collaborateurs, gage de son agilité et de sa capacité à s’adapter. Rejoignez un groupe français engagé en termes de responsabilité sociétale, tant pour ses consommateurs que pour ses collaborateurs ! Plus que jamais la richesse de la société Panzani, ce sont les femmes et les hommes qui y travaillent, au travers des valeurs d’optimisme, d’audace, de proximité et de responsabilité. Notre mission « Bien nourrir sème l’avenir » ! Vous intégrerez le service d’ amélioration continue et de performance industrielle de l'usine La Montre . Grâce à cette alternance, vous aurez l’opportunité de : Participer au déploiement et à l’animation des démarches d’amélioration continue sur le terrain, en étant au contact des opérateurs et managers des différents services, notamment animation de groupes de travail, Analyser les processus existants, identifier les axes de progrès et proposer des plans d’actions adaptés, Mettre en place les outils et méthodologies nécessaires à tendre vers l’excellence opérationnelle, tout en tenant compte de la conduite du changement, Contribuer à des projets transverses de performance industrielle et de standardisation des bonnes pratiques, notamment en collaboration avec le Chargé de projets industriels, Accompagner les équipes opérationnelles dans la conduite du changement avec un rôle de support, de coordination et de suivi des KPI. Vous préparez un diplôme de niveau bac + 3 à bac+5 dans le domaine de l’amélioration continue ou de la performance industrielle ? Vous avez des connaissances en méthodologie de projets et en résolution de problèmes, idéalement acquises dans le secteur agroalimentaire ? Vous disposez de qualités relationnelles, vous êtes reconnu pour votre rigueur et votre professionnalisme. title: SAP Basis Architect
description: What Makes a Honda, Is Who Makes a Honda Honda has a clear vision for the future, and it’s a joyful one. We are looking for individuals with the skills, courage, persistence, and dreams that will help us reach our future-focused goals. At our core is innovation. Honda is constantly innovating and developing solutions to drive our business with record success. We strive to be a company that serves as a source of “power” that supports people around the world who are trying to do things based on their own initiative and that helps people expand their own potential. To this end, Honda strives to realize “the joy and freedom of mobility” by developing new technologies and an innovative approach to achieve a “zero environmental footprint.” We are looking for qualified individuals with diverse backgrounds, experiences, continuous improvement values, and a strong work ethic to join our team. If your goals and values align with Honda’s, we want you to join our team to Bring the Future! Job Purpose We are seeking an experienced SAP Basis Architect to design, manage, and optimize complex SAP landscapes. The ideal candidate will have strong hands-on experience with SAP S/4HANA support, upgrades, conversions, and migrations, along with deep knowledge of SAP Solution Manager, GRC, SAP PO, Fiori, and cloud technologies (SAP BTP). This role plays a critical part in ensuring scalability, availability, security, and long-term SAP platform strategy. Key Accountabilities Provide SAP production support to the North American region through monitoring, alerting, incident/change/problem/request management. Deliver SAP patches and upgrades to all products to maintain environment lifecycle and vulnerability management. Develop and participate in SAP new projects to bring develop new strategy, realize new technologies, and bring functionality to HTA. Participate in internal and external meetings as a representative of the technical team at HTA to the appropriate stakeholders. Complete training as part of continuing education as well as to increase technical skillset and knowledgebase. Train/mentor HTA staff on these learned skills. Create and maintain documentation, including but not limited to processes, procedures, technical maps and drawings, and environment summaries. Create executive summaries as well as technical deep dives in formal reports. Qualifications, Experience, And Skills Minimum Educational Qualifications : BS/BA or combination of education/experience SAP S/4HANA and SAP HANA certification (preferred) ITIL certifications (preferred) RHEL certifications (preferred) Other database certifications including Sybase ASE and MSSQL (preferred) Minimum Experience 5+ years as Basis Administrator / Architect Other Job-Specific Skills S/4HANA Solution Manager GRC Process Orchestration Fiori BTP OpenText VIM, ICC/BCC, Archive Centre HA/DR Backup and recovery Archiving Job Dimensions No. of Direct Reports : 0 No. of Indirect Reports : 0 Financial Dimensions Assist ISD management to define and manage the NA OCM budget (training, tooling, travel). Establish benefit realization for SAP changes: baseline metrics, targets, and financial translation. Business adoption  technical dashboards, quantify gaps and drive corrective actions. Validate benefit capture post-go-live (30/60/90-day reviews). Decisions Expected SAP Landscape Design SAP Platform Strategy Software lifecycle management Training / mentoring Basis staff Working Conditions 50% Hybrid working environment. Additional in-office participation as required. Frequent computer and desk work; extended periods of sitting/standing; regular presentations and facilitation. Regional system support 24/7. Overtime as business needs require, particularly for production support, project support, emergency response. Domestic & International travel to HTNA locations, partner sites, and training venues as required. Handles confidential company and partner information; adheres to IT/security, privacy, and export/compliance policies and required training. Other duties as assigned in support of program outcomes and adoption targets. What differentiates Honda and make us an employer of choice? Total Rewards Competitive Base Salary (pay will be based on several variables that include, but not limited to geographic location, work experience, etc.) Paid Overtime Regional Bonus (when applicable) Industry-leading Benefit Plans (Medical, Dental, Vision, Rx) Paid time off, including vacation, holidays, shutdown Company Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability 401K Plan with company match + additional contribution Relocation assistance (if eligible) Career Growth Advancement Opportunities Career Mobility Education Reimbursement for Continued Learning Training and Development programs Additional Offerings Tuition Assistance & Student Loan Repayment Lifestyle Account Childcare Reimbursement Account Elder Care Support Wellbeing Program Community Service and Engagement Programs Product Programs Honda is an equal opportunity employer and considers qualified applicants for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity and expression, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected factor. title: Addetto/a inventario scorte distribuzione retail
description: Cerchiamo una persona ordinata, veloce e concreta. Nel nostro team entrerai in un magazzino che rifornisce attività della distribuzione retail, con lavoro operativo tra controllo giacenze, ricezione colli e supporto ai riassortimenti nei mesi estivi, quando sostituzioni ferie e volumi richiedono attenzione in più. Ti occuperai di verificare le quantità presenti a scaffale e in area stock, aggiornando le movimentazioni con palmare e gestionale di magazzino. Insieme costruiremo una routine chiara: conteggi ciclici su referenze ad alta rotazione, verifica differenze tra stock fisico e sistema, controllo DDT in ingresso e supporto alla preparazione di circa 40-60 richieste interne al giorno, mantenendo ordinate le ubicazioni e segnalando anomalie al referente logistico. title: Analyst-Business
description: Essential Functions Maintain and enhance SAP SD system. Develop, coordinate and implement improvements in Sales and Distribution. Maintain and enhance Sales system, integrate SAP system with external systems. Communicate with customers to ensure they are equipped with the required data interfaces, including but not limited to EDI. Analyzes sales, inventory control, distribution, cost analysis, finance, marketing and other business functions to develop new or modified information processing systems. Consults with business unit management and personnel to identify and document business needs and objectives, current operational procedures, problems, input and output requirements, data scope, usage, formatting, and security requirements. Provides technical assistance in identifying, evaluating and developing systems and procedures. Writes and maintains functional specifications for new or modified business processes. Lead programmers and a functional team in business systems related projects. Consults and coordinates with programmers to design and develop business processes. Develops, coordinates, and implements plans to test business and functional processes during system development and quality assurance testing. Consults with business unit management and personnel to obtain additional information during system development and evaluate alternatives. Research and recommend system solutions, including custom application or other industry solutions Communicates and collaborates with technical team and business users as needed when developing/implementing/supporting system solutions Analyzes integration, cost analysis, finance, marketing and other business functions in order to develop new or modified information processing systems Writes and maintains functional manuals for new or modified business processes Provide support toward the certification and ensure compliance with the customer required quality management systems (TISAX, TS16949, IATF, etc.) Positions that fall under the functions of Product Development, Legal, HR, IT and Executive Management are required to exercise a higher level of confidentiality and discretion in handling information the positions have access to. Non-essentional Functions Other duties as assigned. SUPERVISION RECEIVED Supervision is typically received from a management member. SUPERVISION ADMINISTERED This position typically does not require the supervision of others Qualifications EDUCATION/EXPERIENCE AND/OR TRAINING Experience in automotive manufacturing is strongly preferred. Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent experience of 10 years supporting SAP and an Associate’s Degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or Management Information Systems.) 5 years of Experience in SAP ECC6 SD (Sales and Distribution), and MM (Materials Management) configuration, and analysis. Experience with system installation, configuration, and analysis. Knowledge of networks and cloud computing. Understanding of software application development, ability to support system applications in development, design and deployment. IT budgeting and cost management experience. LICENSES OR CERTIFICATIONS Valid U.S. driver’s license required PMP and ITIL Certifications, desired TOOLS AND EQUIPMENT: General office equipment includes, but not limited to, a computer, printer, photocopier, shredder, telephone, fax machine, and calculator. Problem-solving Skills KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS, AND ABILITIES The ability to identify and solve complex technical problems and break them down into smaller components. Ability to think creatively and come up with innovative solutions. Meticulous attention to detail in writing code and following best practices. Ability to persevere through challenges and setbacks. VERBAL COMMUNICATION SKILLS Use verbal skills to transfer information to groups. WRITTEN COMMUNICATION SKILLS Prepare business documents, client case notes, and technical reports. MATH SKILLS Perform basic mathematical computations. Computer Skills Database / Contact Management Software Internet / Email Presentation Software Spreadsheet Software Word Processing Software Mental Demands Typically Required. Concentration and attentiveness Manage multiple projects and tasks Independent judgment and discretion Deescalate high conflict situations Read and comprehend instructions/work orders Respond to unpredictability Organize and prioritize Relate to others PHYSICAL DEMANDS typically required FREQUENTLY INCURRED (between 26% and 75% time on job) Ability to stand Ability to sit Ability to communicate orally Ability to hear and engage in conversation. OCCASIONALLY INCURRED (up to 25% time on job) Ability to walk Repetitive finger movement Ability to use both hands Repetitive twisting or pressure involving wrists or hands WORKING CONDITIONS typically required FREQUENTLY INCURRED (Average 10% time on job) Travel with overnight stays PERSONAL PROTECTIVE EQUIPMENT This position typically does not require the use of personal protective equipment. Employees may be required to wear personal protective equipment (PPE), including safety glasses or work gloves, when performing specific tasks in certain work conditions or environments. To perform this job successfully, an individual must be able to perform each essential function satisfactorily. The requirements listed are representative of the knowledge, skill, and/or ability required. Reasonable accommodation may be made to enable individuals with disabilities to perform the essential functions. Summary Of Benefits And EEO Statement Alps Alpine NA, Inc. offers competitive salaries with a great work environment. Our comprehensive employee benefits package includes: PPO Health Benefits (medical/dental/vision) Effective on Start Date 401(k) Retirement Plan with Company Match Opportunity for Annual Bonuses Generous PTO and Holiday Schedule Flexible Spending Accounts Employee Assistance Program Employee Product Purchase Discounts Wellness Reimbursement Program Life, AD&D, Short and Long-Term Disability Insurances Hybrid Work Location (3 Office :2 Home) Alps Alpine NA, Inc. values its members as individuals and is committed to forming an energetic and attractive company where the quality of work is enhanced. Alps Alpine North America, Inc. is an Equal Opportunity Employer. It is the policy of Alps Alpine NA, Inc. to consider all job applications on the basis of merit without regard to race, color, religion, gender, pregnancy, age, national origin, ancestry, marital status, veteran status, disability, medical condition, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. title: *SAP Referral/Expression of Interest*
description: Transform your career by engaging with innovative solutions! In this role, you will be a subject matter expert, collaborating with various teams to contribute to key decisions and provide effective solutions to challenges. We are excited to see how your contributions will make a difference in our organization! Collaborate with cross-functional teams to identify and implement effective solutions. Engage with stakeholders to understand business challenges and requirements. Design and optimize processes to enhance operational efficiency. We Are: Accenture’s SAP practice, and we bring the New to life using design thinking, agile development methodologies, and the latest smart tech like IoT, automation, and AI. We even built myConcerto, a mix of SAP and Accenture that helps take our clients to big wins. Ready to learn as much as you can? We train our people on "new" SAP like SAP Leonardo, S/4HANA and Cloud, and we offer classes and support through our 50,000+ member community. It’s also nice to know our hard work doesn’t go unrecognized. We’ve got over 70 SAP awards—more than any other partner—and we’re the foremost business partner for SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Ariba, SAP Hybris, SAP FieldGlass, SAP Concur, and more. You Are: A transformation maven with the skills to help clients meet the difficulties of digitization. Your superpower? Using your know-how, creativity, and analytical powers to solve clients’ most complex business problems to help their companies do more. You’re as comfortable guiding projects as you are diving into the details of workstreams and configuring SAP solutions. And you possess the communication and people skills to inspire teams to bring their A-game. Ready to put your talents to work in an information systems environment? Your Team : Accenture Technology leverages design thinking, industry insights and the latest digital and Security methodologies to help clients innovate, grow, and improve their businesses. Our expertise, capabilities and experience mean that our clients (including some of the biggest brands in the world) trust us to find the right solutions for their needs. Together with our talented international colleagues, we focus on connecting the needs of businesses with the new possibilities that come with technological progress. Because that's where the real difficulties are: inventing and testing things that have never been tried before, getting new applications ready for roll-out, and ultimately guiding clients to select and implement the right technologies – including state of the art Security solutions - to transform their businesses. Qualifications: SAP is expanding for the new financial year 2025. We are looking for the below skills to expand our practice. We are looking for mid - Senior level experience candidates. SAP S/4HANA FICO SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll SAP Finance SAP SD, MM SAP Integration/PO/PI SAP Tech Arch SAP Plant Maintenance SAP Project/Program Management SAP SuccessFactors Project manager SAP SuccessFactors PMGM SAP Talent modules Benefits of working at Accenture: 18 weeks paid parental leave Long & short-term career break opportunities Structured career development program Local and international career opportunities. Certified as a Family Inclusive Workplace™ Flexible Work Arrangements - centered around Accenture’s Truly Human ethos and our commitment to supporting the health and wellbeing of our people. We are proud to be in the top 3 of last year’s Diversity & Inclusion Index! We are a WORK180 Endorsed Employer, to see our benefits and policies click here All our consulting professionals receive comprehensive training covering business acumen, technical and professional skills development. You’ll also have opportunities to hone your functional skills and expertise in an area of specialization. We offer a variety of formal and informal training programs at every level to help you acquire and build specialized skills faster. Learning takes place both on the job and through formal training conducted online, in the classroom, or in collaboration with teammates. The sheer variety of work we do, and the experience it offers, provide an unbeatable platform from which to build a career. Accenture is a an EEO and Affirmative Action Employee of Females/Minorities/Veterans/Individuals with Disabilities. Equal Employment Opportunity Statement for Australia and New Zealand: At Accenture, our intention is to foster a culture and a workplace in which all of our people feel a sense of belonging and are respected and empowered to do their best work. We encourage applications from all people with the relevant skillset, and we are committed to removing barriers to the recruitment process and employee lifecycle. All employment decisions shall be made without regard to age, disability status, ethnicity, gender, gender identity or expression, religion or sexual orientation and we do not tolerate discrimination. If you require any accommodations or adjustments for interviews and/or at work, please reach out to exectalent@accenture.com or contact us at +61 2 9005 5000 (Australia) or +64 44666056 (New Zealand). Learn how Accenture protects your personal data and know your rights in relation to your personal data. Read more about our Privacy Statement. title: Supervisor(a) de Almacén
description: Descripción de la empresa Somos mucho más que un líder mundial. Te damos la bienvenida tal como eres y puedes encontrar un trabajo una marca que coincida con tu personalidad. Te apoyamos para que crezcas y aprendas cada día, asegurándonos de que el trabajo le dé propósito a tu vida, para que, durante tu viaje con nosotros, puedas seguir explorando las posibilidades ilimitadas de Accor. Al unirte a Accor, cada capítulo de tu historia es suyo para escribir y juntos podemos imaginar la hospitallidad del mañana. Descubre la vida que te espera en Accor, visita https://careers.accor.com/ Descripción del empleo Misión Principal Garantizar la correcta administración y control de los inventarios mediante la planificación, supervisión y optimización de las operaciones del almacén, asegurando el abastecimiento oportuno de materiales e insumos para la continuidad de las operaciones del hotel. Asimismo, elaborar y analizar indicadores e informes de gestión que permitan monitorear el desempeño del almacén y contribuir a la toma de decisiones y a la mejora continua de los procesos. Funciones Supervisar y asegurar la correcta recepción, almacenamiento, conservación y despacho de materiales e insumos, verificando el cumplimiento de los procedimientos establecidos. Garantizar el registro oportuno y preciso de los movimientos de inventario (ingresos, salidas, transferencias y devoluciones) en el sistema. Velar por la adecuada clasificación, identificación y almacenamiento de los productos, asegurando el cumplimiento de las políticas de rotación (FIFO/FEFO cuando corresponda). Supervisar el abastecimiento oportuno a las diferentes áreas usuarias, garantizando la continuidad de las operaciones. Controlar la calidad, cantidad y estado de los productos recibidos y despachados. Planificar, coordinar y ejecutar inventarios cíclicos y generales, asegurando la confiabilidad de la información. Analizar las diferencias de inventario, identificar sus causas e implementar acciones correctivas. Monitorear permanentemente los niveles de stock para prevenir quiebres, sobre inventarios y pérdidas. Elaborar reportes periódicos de consumo, inventarios e indicadores de gestión del almacén para la toma de decisiones. Gestionar la documentación correspondiente a las operaciones del almacén, incluyendo comprobantes, notas de ingreso y salida, devoluciones y demás registros. Coordinar con el área de Compras la devolución de productos no conformes y realizar el seguimiento correspondiente. Supervisar, distribuir y hacer seguimiento a las actividades del personal a cargo, asegurando el cumplimiento de los objetivos del área. Coordinar el proceso de porcionado de carnes y embutidos, verificando el cumplimiento de los estándares establecidos. Velar por el orden, limpieza, seguridad y mantenimiento de las instalaciones del almacén. Identificar oportunidades de mejora e implementar acciones orientadas a optimizar los procesos logísticos y el control de inventarios. Cumplir y hacer cumplir las políticas corporativas, normas de seguridad, salud ocupacional e inocuidad aplicables al área. Realizar otras funciones afines al cargo que le sean asignadas por su jefe inmediato. Requisitos Egresado técnico en Administración, Logística, Administración Hotelera, Turismo o carreras afines. 3 a 4 años de experiencia en general (02 años como jefe de almacén, supervisor de almacén, encargado u otros) Conocimientos en gestión de Almacenes, control de inventarios, gestión de stock, SAP Bussiness One o ERP similar. (indispensable). title: Directeur Supply Chain H/F
description: Et si vous rejoigniez l'un des groupes les plus dynamiques de la santé naturelle en Europe ? Depuis plus de 75 ans, Olyos accompagne des millions de personnes vers un mieux-être au quotidien, à travers des marques de confiance comme Granions, Drasanvi et NewScience , présentes en pharmacies, parapharmacies et e-commerce dans plus de 60 pays. Avec plus de 700 collaborateurs répartis dans ses filiales en France, Belgique, Espagne, Portugal, Italie, Costa Rica, Perou et Chili, et plus de 230 M€ de chiffre d'affaires , Olyos est le 4ᵉ laboratoire de compléments alimentaires en pharmacie en France et affiche la plus forte croissance du secteur ces trois dernières années, dans un marché en expansion de +7% porté par des tendances de fond : montée de la prévention, demande croissante pour le naturel, rôle renforcé du pharmacien comme acteur de santé de proximité. Notre force ? Maîtriser toute la chaîne — de la formulation scientifique à la production jusqu'à la mise sur le marché, avec deux sites de production en France et en Espagne, et un modèle commercial orienté sell-out qui nous permet de gagner des parts de marché année après année. Sur les cinq dernières années, Olyos a combiné une croissance organique de +20% et plusieurs acquisitions stratégiques pour renforcer son empreinte internationale et développer de nouvelles adjacences. Adossé à Motion Equity Partners , fonds de private equity européen de référence, le groupe dispose des moyens et de l'ambition pour poursuivre cette trajectoire. Un groupe international, mais des équipes qui se connaissent, une culture entrepreneuriale où l'initiative est valorisée. Engagé dans une démarche d'amélioration continue en matière sociale et environnementale, notre mission est de contribuer au bien-être de tous. Pour accompagner notre croissance, en France et à l’international, nous recherchons un(e) Directeur Supply Chain. Avantages Convention Collective Industrie Pharma Mutuelle familiale prise en charge à 70% Politique de bien-être au travail Douches disponibles Parcours de santé à proximité Télétravail Tickets restaurants Dans un contexte de croissance et de structuration de notre supply chain, nous recrutons un(e) Directeur(trice) Supply Chain pour accompagner la transformation et renforcer l’excellence opérationnelle. Rattaché(e) au Directeur des Opérations du Groupe, vous contribuez au pilotage global de la chaîne d’approvisionnement, dans un environnement multi-sites/ Multi-sociétés et multi-canals (pharmacies, GMS, e-commerce, export,…). Co-piloter la stratégie supply chain et participer à sa mise en œuvre opérationnelle Superviser les activités d’approvisionnement. Garantir la disponibilité des matières premières et des composants. Coordonner la gestion des flux physiques et d’information entre les différents acteurs de la Supply chain (Amont / Aval). Optimiser les niveaux de stocks et les flux, en garantissant le taux de service Piloter la performance via des KPI (taux de service, OTIF clients - Fournisseur, couverture de stock, etc.) Manager et accompagner les équipes supply chain (approvisionnement, Service Clients) Conduire les projets de transformation : digitalisation, amélioration continue, optimisation des flux, évolution des outils ERP/Workflow/... Assurer une coordination étroite avec les équipes internes (qualité, réglementaire, marketing, commerce, Demand Planning, R&D, Achats, Finance) et les partenaires industriels/sous-traitants. Veiller au respect des exigences qualité et réglementaires propres au secteur (traçabilité, gestion des lots, DLC/DDM) Gérer l’administration des ventes sur l’ensemble des canaux de distribution. (Saisie de commandes, gestions des litiges et de la relation clients). « Piloter » l’activité de l’entrepôt pour assurer un service Best In Class. Piloter et animer des projets d’amélioration continue. Assurer la qualité des données dans le système d’information (SAP ECC6) en responsabilisant ses équipes. Organiser les inventaires annuels et tournants pour la filiale françaises. Formation et expérience Formation : Titulaire d’un Master en Supply Chain Management. Expérience 8/10 ans minimum dans une fonction similaire, idéalement dans un environnement pharmaceutique / cosmétique ou agroalimentaire. Expérience managériale solide Maitrise d’un ERP (SAP un plus) Sensibilité aux enjeux qualité et réglementaires. Leadership, capacité à structurer et à accompagner le changement. Compétences techniques Maîtrise du Pack Office (Excel, Outlook, Powerpoint). Maitrise des logiciels SAP, PowerBI Connaissance du process S&OP Connaissance de l’EDI. (Maitrise un plus). Anglais obligatoire (Espagnol un plus) Qualités personnelles Vision globale et transversale. Dynamique, Organisé(e), Rigoureux. Autonome. Analytique et esprit de synthèse. Capacité à fédérer et à mettre en exigence ses interlocuteurs. Agilité. Capacité à piloter le changement de façon transversale. Contrat Type de contrat : CDI Statut : Cadre Rémunération : à négocier suivant le profil Lieu : Mougins Disponibilité : ASAP Show more Show less Seniority level Entry level Employment type Full-time Job function Management and Manufacturing Industries Spectator Sports Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at EA Pharma by 2x See who you know

title: Analyst, Accounting & Reporting
description: Relocation Assistance Offered Within Country Job Number #173374 - Mumbai, Maharashtra, India Who We Are Colgate-Palmolive Company is a global consumer products company operating in over 200 countries specialising in Oral Care, Personal Care, Home Care, Skin Care, and Pet Nutrition. Our products are trusted in more households than any other brand in the world, making us a household name! Join Colgate-Palmolive, a caring, innovative growth company reimagining a healthier future for people, their pets, and our planet. Guided by our core values—Caring, Inclusive, and Courageous—we foster a culture that inspires our people to achieve common goals. Together, let's build a brighter, healthier future for all. Title: Analyst, Accounting & Reporting Finance Brief introduction - As a seasoned finance professional, you will oversee the end-to-end integrity of financial reporting and month-end closing processes while ensuring strict adherence to US GAAP standards. You will drive operational excellence through robust SOX compliance , continuous process improvements, and the delivery of high-quality MIS to support management decision-making. Beyond the numbers, you will act as a pivotal leader, mentoring a global team and fostering strong stakeholder relationships to ensure seamless service delivery. Key Responsibilities include, but are not limited to: Reconcile Balance Sheet Accounts, Bank accounts and follow up on open items Ensure that all the accounting is in compliance with the US GAAPs Ensure the effective controls are maintained to achieve high accuracy as per the internal company guidelines Execute intercompany transactions Perform cash application and Netting process for ICO customers/ICO Vendors Ensure accurate working and posting of Rule based journal entries Perform the entire range of activities pertaining to closing books of accounts in close co-ordination with local team/business Review and timely resolution of all audit queries Engage with local teams to stay aligned on all the processes, resolve issues on timely basis Undertake assessment cycles for seamless movement from FI to PA module at month end Perform all accounting activities as per the defined SOPs Review the SOP periodically and recommend necessary changes as and when needed in consultation with relevant stake holders Perform all the compliances as per SOX guidelines Participate in standardization and continuous improvement initiatives as well as other business partner initiatives Ensure prompt response to queries of local business Required Qualifications : B Com/ MBA Proficient knowledge of Indian GAAP, US GAAP and IFRS Proficient knowledge of Google Suite SAP experience Impactful communication and strong people management skills Preferred Qualifications : B Com/ MBA Proficient knowledge of Indian GAAP, US GAAP and IFRS Proficient knowledge of Google Suite SAP experience Impactful communication and strong people management skills Our Commitment to Inclusion Our journey begins with our people—developing strong talent with diverse backgrounds and perspectives to best serve our consumers around the world and fostering an inclusive environment where everyone feels a true sense of belonging. We are dedicated to ensuring that each individual can be their authentic self, is treated with respect, and is empowered by leadership to contribute meaningfully to our business. Equal Opportunity Employer Colgate is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, ethnicity, age, disability, marital status, veteran status (United States positions), or any other characteristic protected by law. Reasonable accommodation during the application process is available for persons with disabilities. Please complete this request form should you require accommodation. title: Sr. Executive / Executive – Invoice Processing & Travel and Expense
description: Company Description Our Parent Organization, NEC Corporation, is a 25 billion Company with offices spread across the globe. NEC is a multinational provider of information technology (IT) services and products, headquartered in Tokyo Japan with 122 years of experience in evolution with technology and innovation. It is recognized as a ‘Top 50 Innovative Company’ globally NEC Corporation has established itself as a leader in the integration of IT and network technologies while promoting the brand statement of “Orchestrating a brighter world.” NEC enables businesses and communities to adapt to rapid changes taking place in both society and the market as it provides for the social values of safety, security, fairness and efficiency to promote a more sustainable world where everyone has the chance to reach their full potential. NEC Software Solutions (India) Private Limited! is based in Mumbai (Worli & Airoli) and Bangalore with an employee strength of 1500+. It is one of the foremost providers of end-to-end IT services across various sectors. We work with diverse industry verticals which include publishing, media, financial services, retail, healthcare and technology companies around the world. Our customers range from two-person startups to $bn listed companies. We have more than 30 years of experience in providing end to end IT services across the globe and have earned a reputation for delighting our customers by consistently surpassing expectations and helping them deliver robust, market-ready software products that meet the highest standards of engineering and user experience. Supported by more than 1300 exceptionally talented manpower, we are a hub for offshore support and technology services Job Description Education: Graduate or MBA/Post Graduate bachelor’s in commerce Experience (years): Sr. Executive - Graduate or Postgraduate with 4 to 6 yrs of experience Location: Mumbai (Airoli) and Bangalore Working Hours: 8.5 hours/day (APAC Shift) Role Requirements: This position currently requires Work from Home during Early Morning Shift as per project needs. The candidate must be flexible to travel based on business requirements during this period. There may be a prepone in shift timing, which will be reviewed post-transition. Following the transition, the role will shift to a Hybrid Work from Office model, in alignment with company guidelines. Role Summary: Individual will be responsible for Invoice Processing-Accounts payable, Vendor Helpdesk and Query resolution Qualification Criteria/Work Experience Essential: Have worked in SAP environment having T-code knowledge Experience in shared services / customer facing environment Have fair knowledge of the Procure to Pay Process Understanding of Standard Operating Procedures (SOP/DTP) Good Word, Excel & PowerPoint skills Good verbal and written communication skills VIM-SAP working knowledge will be added advantage Well-in Confidence to handle multi-tasking ability and well-verse into it Overall Project/Task description: Ensure timely processing of invoices ensuring the invoices are processed correctly and error free taking into account the terms and conditions of contracts. Exercise control on open GRIR, open advances report, critical vendor report Ensure that the Employees’ and Vendor’s ledger is operated accurately, efficiently and to agreed timescale and ensure that the Employees and Vendors are paid accurately and on time. Accounts Payable Vendor helpdesk knowledge- Handling Query Management Verify payable information in the system & highlight any data discrepancy Responsible for documenting bounced and fraudulent payments and notifying the proper authorities as and when such documents are created Respond to queries in a timely and accurate manner Managing escalations from vendors including periodical reconciliation of Statement of Accounts Assist on month end closing end to end Create data trackers for supporting monitoring activities Ensuring the SLA on timeline for processing AP Invoices is met Publish Monthly/ weekly reports of the BU that is supported Vendor Analysis & GR/IR Analysis Monthly AP Ageing Knowledge to ensure debit balance are timely taken care Timely reversal and rectification to be taken care Identify opportunities for process improvements within the accounts payable function Transition of new activities, build effective SOPs & train team Ensure work with business stakeholders to close the AP on time and accurate Understanding on the different types of invoice processing and clearing blocks of AP books Additional Information Excellent Communication Skills required. title: Assistant Manager – Cost & Procurement
description: Role: Assistant Manager – Cost & Procurement (Warehousing CAPEX & Financial Control – Pan-India DCs, FCs & Dark Stores) Location: Mumbai Function: Operations Excellence – Cost Governance Reports to: Senior Manager – Operational Excellence / Network Strategy Type: Full-time Experience: 3–6 years in supply chain finance / procurement governance / cost control for warehousing or e-commerce About The Role The Assistant Manager – Cost & Procurement Governance will anchor financial discipline and capital governance across the pan-India network of Distribution Centers (DCs), Fulfillment Centers (FCs), and Dark Stores. This role will own end-to-end CAPEX tracking, budget governance, procurement process coordination, asset capitalization tracking, and financial reporting for all infrastructure, automation, and technology initiatives across nodes. By combining structured financial control with cross-functional coordination, you will ensure capital deployment is controlled, compliant, and aligned to approved business cases — enabling scalable and sustainable network expansion. Note: Commercial negotiations and rate finalization are managed by Central Procurement and are outside the scope of this role. Key Responsibilities CAPEX Planning & Governance: Support annual CAPEX planning across DCs, FCs, and Dark Stores. Maintain centralized CAPEX tracker (project-wise, node-wise, network-level). Monitor Budget vs. Actual (BvA) and committed vs. invoiced spends. Track cost burn rate across projects and flag deviations proactively. Drive financial visibility across ongoing and upcoming expansion projects. Ensure alignment with approved Cost Benefit Analysis (CBA). Procurement Process Coordination (Non-Negotiation Scope): Coordinate PR-to-PO process with Central Procurement. Validate budget approvals prior to PO issuance. Track PO release timelines and milestone-based billing. Ensure invoice validation, GRN alignment, and documentation accuracy. Maintain audit-ready procurement documentation repository. Project Cost Monitoring & Control: Track capital spends across automation, MHE, racking, civil works, CCTV, security systems, and tech integrations. Ensure cost tagging to correct cost centers and asset classes. Highlight cost overruns and support corrective action planning. Monitor committed liability exposure and future payment obligations. Asset Capitalization & Financial Compliance: Coordinate with Finance for asset capitalization and asset master updates. Track capitalization timelines and depreciation start dates. Ensure documentation compliance for statutory and internal audits. Maintain network-level asset governance tracker. Data, Analytics & Reporting: Develop dashboards for CAPEX tracking and capital efficiency metrics. Track capital productivity indicators (₹ per sq. ft., ₹ per pallet position, ₹ per throughput unit). Present monthly financial governance reports to leadership. Support expansion feasibility analysis with structured cost inputs. Success Metrics CAPEX budget adherence % Budget forecasting accuracy Variance reduction across projects On-time PR/PO coordination % Invoice validation accuracy % Asset capitalization compliance % Zero major audit observations Reporting timeliness adherence Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Engineering / Finance / Supply Chain / Operations 2-4 years of experience in cost control, procurement governance, or supply chain finance Experience in multi-site warehousing or e-commerce environment preferred Strong understanding of CAPEX vs OPEX classification Working knowledge of ERP systems (SAP / Oracle / similar) Advanced Excel / financial dashboarding capability What We Offer Exposure to network-level capital governance across pan-India operations Ownership of high-impact automation and expansion financial tracking Career growth across Operations Excellence, Strategy, and Finance leadership tracks Opportunity to build structured capital governance frameworks in a scaling e-commerce environment Show more Show less Seniority level Mid-Senior level Employment type Full-time Job function Purchasing and Supply Chain Industries Technology, Information and Internet Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Purplle.com by 2x See who you know
